7:186.qunbul_text: Whomever Allah leads astray has no guide, and We leave them to wander aimlessly while exceeding all limits.
7:186.bazzi_ar_text: مَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۚ وَنَذَرُهُمُۥ فِي طُغۡيَٰنِهِمُۥ يَعۡمَهُونَ
7:186.qunbul_ar_text: مَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۚ وَنَذَرُهُمُۥ فِي طُغۡيَٰنِهِمُۥ يَعۡمَهُونَ

8:11.base_text: Recall: (Allah) covering you pl tightly with drowsiness, as security from Him, and bestowing upon you water from the sky to purify you with it and to remove from you Satan’s distress and to fortify your hearts and to strengthen your foothold.
8:11.bazzi_text: Recall: drowsiness covering you, as security from Him, and Him sending down to you water from the sky to purify you with it and to remove from you Satan’s distress and to fortify your hearts and to strengthen your foothold.
8:11.qunbul_text: Recall: drowsiness covering you, as security from Him, and Him sending down to you water from the sky to purify you with it and to remove from you Satan’s distress and to fortify your hearts and to strengthen your foothold.
8:11.bazzi_ar_text: إِذۡ يَغۡشَىٰكُمُ ٱلنُّعَاسُ أَمَنَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ وَيُنزِلُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ لِّيُطَهِّرَكُمُۥ بِهِۦ وَيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُۥ رِجۡزَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِ وَلِيَرۡبِطَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِكُمُۥ وَيُثَبِّتَ بِهِ ٱلۡأَقۡدَامَ
8:11.qunbul_ar_text: إِذۡ يَغۡشَىٰكُمُ ٱلنُّعَاسُ أَمَنَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ وَيُنزِلُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ لِّيُطَهِّرَكُمُۥ بِهِۦ وَيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُۥ رِجۡزَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِ وَلِيَرۡبِطَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِكُمُۥ وَيُثَبِّتَ بِهِ ٱلۡأَقۡدَامَ

8:19.base_text: “If youpl desire a conquest, then the conquest has come to you; and if you desist, it would be better for you. But if you return, We will return; and your battalion, however numerous, will not avail you in anything. And (know) that Allah is with the believers.”
8:19.bazzi_text: “If youpl desire a conquest, then the conquest has come to you; and if you desist, it would be better for you. But if you return, We will return; and your battalion, however numerous, will not avail you in anything. For indeed Allah is with the believers.”
8:19.qunbul_text: “If youpl desire a conquest, then the conquest has come to you; and if you desist, it would be better for you. But if you return, We will return; and your battalion, however numerous, will not avail you in anything. For indeed Allah is with the believers.”
8:19.bazzi_ar_text: إِن تَسۡتَفۡتِحُواْ فَقَدۡ جَآءَكُمُ ٱلۡفَتۡحُۖ وَإِن تَنتَهُواْ فَهُوَ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمُۥۖ وَإِن تَعُودُواْ نَعُدۡ وَلَن تُغۡنِيَ عَنكُمُۥ فِئَتُكُمُۥ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَوۡ كَثُرَتۡ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
8:19.qunbul_ar_text: إِن تَسۡتَفۡتِحُواْ فَقَدۡ جَآءَكُمُ ٱلۡفَتۡحُۖ وَإِن تَنتَهُواْ فَهُوَ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمُۥۖ وَإِن تَعُودُواْ نَعُدۡ وَلَن تُغۡنِيَ عَنكُمُۥ فِئَتُكُمُۥ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَوۡ كَثُرَتۡ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ

8:59.base_text: And let not the deniers think that they are ahead. Indeed, they cannot thwart (God).
8:59.bazzi_text: And do not think that the deniers are ahead. Indeed, they cannot thwart (God).
8:59.qunbul_text: And do not think that the deniers are ahead. Indeed, they cannot thwart (God).
8:59.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَا تَحۡسِبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ سَبَقُواْۚ إِنَّهُمُۥ لَا يُعۡجِزُونَ
8:59.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَا تَحۡسِبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ سَبَقُواْۚ إِنَّهُمُۥ لَا يُعۡجِزُونَ

9:17.base_text: Never was it befitting for the polytheists to attend Allah’s mosques while professing their denial. Those—their deeds were nullified, and in the Fire they abide.
9:17.bazzi_text: Never was it befitting for the polytheists to attend Allah’s mosque while professing their denial. Those—their deeds were nullified, and in the Fire they abide.
9:17.qunbul_text: Never was it befitting for the polytheists to attend Allah’s mosque while professing their denial. Those—their deeds were nullified, and in the Fire they abide.
9:17.bazzi_ar_text: مَا كَانَ لِلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ أَن يَعۡمُرُواْ مَسۡجِدَ ٱللَّهِ شَٰهِدِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِهِمُۥ بِٱلۡكُفۡرِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ حَبِطَتۡ أَعۡمَٰلُهُمُۥ وَفِي ٱلنَّارِ هُمُۥ خَٰلِدُونَ
9:17.qunbul_ar_text: مَا كَانَ لِلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ أَن يَعۡمُرُواْ مَسۡجِدَ ٱللَّهِ شَٰهِدِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِهِمُۥ بِٱلۡكُفۡرِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ حَبِطَتۡ أَعۡمَٰلُهُمُۥ وَفِي ٱلنَّارِ هُمُۥ خَٰلِدُونَ

9:37.base_text: Indeed, postponing the inviolable months is but another act of denial by which those who have denied are led astray. They allow it one year and forbid it another year in order to conform to the number made inviolable by Allah, thus permitting what Allah has forbidden. The evil of their deeds was adorned to them. And Allah does not guide the denying people.
9:37.bazzi_text: Indeed, postponing the inviolable months is but another act of denial by which those who have denied go astray. They allow it one year and forbid it another year in order to conform to the number made inviolable by Allah, thus permitting what Allah has forbidden. The evil of their deeds was adorned to them. And Allah does not guide the denying people.
9:37.qunbul_text: Indeed, postponing the inviolable months is but another act of denial by which those who have denied go astray. They allow it one year and forbid it another year in order to conform to the number made inviolable by Allah, thus permitting what Allah has forbidden. The evil of their deeds was adorned to them. And Allah does not guide the denying people.
9:37.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّسِيٓءُ زِيَادَةٞ فِي ٱلۡكُفۡرِۖ يَضِلُّ بِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ يُحِلُّونَهُۥ عَامٗا وَيُحَرِّمُونَهُۥ عَامٗا لِّيُوَاطِـُٔواْ عِدَّةَ مَا حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ فَيُحِلُّواْ مَا حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُۚ زُيِّنَ لَهُمُۥ سُوٓءُ اَ۬عۡمَٰلِهِمُۥۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهۡدِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
9:37.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّسِيٓءُ زِيَادَةٞ فِي ٱلۡكُفۡرِۖ يَضِلُّ بِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ يُحِلُّونَهُۥ عَامٗا وَيُحَرِّمُونَهُۥ عَامٗا لِّيُوَاطِـُٔواْ عِدَّةَ مَا حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ فَيُحِلُّواْ مَا حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُۚ زُيِّنَ لَهُمُۥ سُوٓءُ اَ۬عۡمَٰلِهِمُۥۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهۡدِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ

9:64.base_text: The hypocrites worry lest a surah be bestowed from on high upon them, informing them of what is in their hearts. Say, “Go on ridiculing; indeed, Allah is sure to bring out what you are afraid of.”
9:64.bazzi_text: The hypocrites worry lest a surah be sent down to them, informing them of what is in their hearts. Say, “Go on ridiculing; indeed, Allah is sure to bring out what you are afraid of.”
9:64.qunbul_text: The hypocrites worry lest a surah be sent down to them, informing them of what is in their hearts. Say, “Go on ridiculing; indeed, Allah is sure to bring out what you are afraid of.”
9:64.bazzi_ar_text: يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ أَن تُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ سُورَةٞ تُنَبِّئُهُمُۥ بِمَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمُۥۚ قُلِ ٱسۡتَهۡزِءُواْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡرِجٞ مَّا تَحۡذَرُونَ
9:64.qunbul_ar_text: يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ أَن تُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ سُورَةٞ تُنَبِّئُهُمُۥ بِمَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمُۥۚ قُلِ ٱسۡتَهۡزِءُواْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡرِجٞ مَّا تَحۡذَرُونَ

9:66.base_text: Do not make excuses. You have surely denied after having attained faith. If We pardon a faction of you, We will punish another faction because they were criminals.
9:66.bazzi_text: Do not make excuses. You have surely denied after having attained faith. If a faction of you is pardoned, We will punish another faction because they were criminals.
9:66.qunbul_text: Do not make excuses. You have surely denied after having attained faith. If a faction of you is pardoned, We will punish another faction because they were criminals.
9:66.bazzi_ar_text: لَا تَعۡتَذِرُواْ قَدۡ كَفَرۡتُمُۥ بَعۡدَ إِيمَٰنِكُمُۥۚ إِن يُعۡفَ عَن طَآئِفَةٖ مِّنكُمُۥ تُعَذَّبۡ طَآئِفَةُۢ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ كَانُواْ مُجۡرِمِينَ
9:66.qunbul_ar_text: لَا تَعۡتَذِرُواْ قَدۡ كَفَرۡتُمُۥ بَعۡدَ إِيمَٰنِكُمُۥۚ إِن يُعۡفَ عَن طَآئِفَةٖ مِّنكُمُۥ تُعَذَّبۡ طَآئِفَةُۢ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ كَانُواْ مُجۡرِمِينَ

9:103.base_text: Take a donation from their wealths to sanctify them and purify them with, and pray for them; indeed, your prayer is (a source of) rest for them. And Allah is All-Hearing, All-Knowing.
9:103.bazzi_ar_text: خُذۡ مِنۡ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمُۥ صَدَقَةٗ تُطَهِّرُهُمُۥ وَتُزَكِّيهِمُۥ بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيۡهِمُۥۖ إِنَّ صَلَوَٰتِكَ سَكَنٞ لَّهُمُۥۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
9:103.qunbul_ar_text: خُذۡ مِنۡ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمُۥ صَدَقَةٗ تُطَهِّرُهُمُۥ وَتُزَكِّيهِمُۥ بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيۡهِمُۥۖ إِنَّ صَلَوَٰتِكَ سَكَنٞ لَّهُمُۥۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ

10:16.base_text: Say, “Had Allah willed, I would not have read it to you and He would not have informed you about it, for I have certainly lived among you for a lifetime before it. Do you not reason?”
10:16.bazzi_text: and He would have informed you about it (through someone else)
10:16.qunbul_text: Say, “Had Allah willed, I would not have read it to you and He would not have informed you about it, for I have certainly lived among you for a lifetime before it. Do you not reason?”
10:16.bazzi_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَا تَلَوۡتُهُۥ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا أَدۡرَىٰكُمُۥ بِهِۦۖ فَقَدۡ لَبِثۡتُ فِيكُمُۥ عُمُرٗا مِّن قَبۡلِهِۦۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
10:16.qunbul_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَا تَلَوۡتُهُۥ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا أَدۡرَىٰكُمُۥ بِهِۦۖ فَقَدۡ لَبِثۡتُ فِيكُمُۥ عُمُرٗا مِّن قَبۡلِهِۦۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ

10:23.base_text: But when He has saved them, there they are, committing unjustified aggression in the land. O mankind, your oppression is only against yourselves— (you only enjoy) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, then to Us is your return and We will inform you of what you used to do.
10:23.bazzi_text: O mankind, your oppression against yourselves is (only) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life
10:23.qunbul_text: O mankind, your oppression against yourselves is (only) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life
10:23.bazzi_ar_text: فَلَمَّا أَنجَىٰهُمُۥ إِذَا هُمُۥ يَبۡغُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّۗ يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِكُمُۥۖ مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمُۥ فَنُنَبِّئُكُمُۥ بِمَا كُنتُمُۥ تَعۡمَلُونَ
10:23.qunbul_ar_text: فَلَمَّا أَنجَىٰهُمُۥ إِذَا هُمُۥ يَبۡغُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّۗ يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِكُمُۥۖ مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمُۥ فَنُنَبِّئُكُمُۥ بِمَا كُنتُمُۥ تَعۡمَلُونَ

10:27.base_text: But those who have earned evil deeds— the repayment of an evil deed shall be the like of it, and humiliation overwhelms them; they will have no safeguard from Allah, as if their faces have been covered with dark patches of night. Those are the fellows of the Fire; therein they abide.
10:27.bazzi_text: covered by the dark phase of the night.
10:27.qunbul_text: covered by the dark phase of the night.
10:27.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَسَبُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ جَزَآءُ سَيِّئَةِۭ بِمِثۡلِهَا وَتَرۡهَقُهُمُۥ ذِلَّةٞۖ مَّا لَهُمُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۡ عَاصِمٖۖ كَأَنَّمَا أُغۡشِيَتۡ وُجُوهُهُمُۥ قِطۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مُظۡلِمًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِۖ هُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
10:27.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَسَبُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ جَزَآءُ سَيِّئَةِۭ بِمِثۡلِهَا وَتَرۡهَقُهُمُۥ ذِلَّةٞۖ مَّا لَهُمُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۡ عَاصِمٖۖ كَأَنَّمَا أُغۡشِيَتۡ وُجُوهُهُمُۥ قِطۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مُظۡلِمًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِۖ هُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ

10:45.base_text: And on the day when He herds them, (it will be) as if they had remained for only one hour of a day, getting to know one another. Those who disbelieved the meeting with Allah have certainly lost and were not guided.
10:45.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمُۥ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُواْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلنَّهَارِ يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمُۥۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ
10:45.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمُۥ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُواْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلنَّهَارِ يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمُۥۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ

10:88.base_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to make (others) stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.bazzi_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.qunbul_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰ رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ ءَاتَيۡتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَأَهُۥ زِينَةٗ وَأَمۡوَٰلٗا فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا رَبَّنَا لِيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِكَۖ رَبَّنَا ٱطۡمِسۡ عَلَىٰ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمُۥ وَٱشۡدُدۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمُۥ فَلَا يُؤۡمِنُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
10:88.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰ رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ ءَاتَيۡتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَأَهُۥ زِينَةٗ وَأَمۡوَٰلٗا فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا رَبَّنَا لِيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِكَۖ رَبَّنَا ٱطۡمِسۡ عَلَىٰ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمُۥ وَٱشۡدُدۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمُۥ فَلَا يُؤۡمِنُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ

10:103.base_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to saved the believers.
10:103.bazzi_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to deliver the believers.
10:103.qunbul_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to deliver the believers.
10:103.bazzi_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي رُسُلَنَا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنَجِّ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
10:103.qunbul_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي رُسُلَنَا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنَجِّ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ

11:3.base_text: So askpl your Lord for forgiveness then repent to Him, that He may grant you good enjoyment for a stated term and bestow His grace upon every graceful one. But if they turn away, then I fear for you the punishment of a supreme day.
11:3.bazzi_text: So askpl your Lord for forgiveness then repent to Him, that He may grant you good enjoyment for a stated term and bestow His grace upon every graceful one. But if youpl turn away, then I fear for you the punishment of a supreme day.
11:3.qunbul_text: So askpl your Lord for forgiveness then repent to Him, that He may grant you good enjoyment for a stated term and bestow His grace upon every graceful one. But if they turn away, then I fear for you the punishment of a supreme day.
11:3.bazzi_ar_text: وَأَنِ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمُۥ ثُمَّ تُوبُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُمَتِّعۡكُمُۥ مَتَٰعًا حَسَنًا إِلَىٰ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗى وَيُؤۡتِ كُلَّ ذِي فَضۡلٖ فَضۡلَهُۥۖ وَإِن تَّوَلَّوۡاْ فَإِنِّيَ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٖ كَبِيرٍ
11:3.qunbul_ar_text: وَأَنِ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمُۥ ثُمَّ تُوبُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُمَتِّعۡكُمُۥ مَتَٰعًا حَسَنًا إِلَىٰ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗى وَيُؤۡتِ كُلَّ ذِي فَضۡلٖ فَضۡلَهُۥۖ وَإِن تَوَلَّوۡاْ فَإِنِّيَ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٖ كَبِيرٍ

11:24.base_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:24.bazzi_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?
11:24.qunbul_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?
11:24.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:24.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

11:28.base_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it was made invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.bazzi_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.qunbul_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.bazzi_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمُۥ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمُۥ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
11:28.qunbul_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمُۥ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمُۥ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ

11:30.base_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:30.bazzi_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?
11:30.qunbul_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?
11:30.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمُۥۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:30.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمُۥۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

11:40.base_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each kind, a male and female coupled, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.bazzi_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.qunbul_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.bazzi_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
11:40.qunbul_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءَ ا۬مۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ

11:46.base_text: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so do not ask Me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”
11:46.bazzi_text: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”
11:46.qunbul_text: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”
11:46.bazzi_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيۡسَ مِنۡ أَهۡلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيۡرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسۡـَٔلَنَّ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۖ إِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِينَ
11:46.qunbul_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيۡسَ مِنۡ أَهۡلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيۡرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسۡـَٔلَنَّ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۖ إِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِينَ

11:57.base_text: But if they turn away, then I have conveyed to you what I was sent to you with. And my Lord will make other people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. My Lord is indeed a Constant Preserver over everything.
11:57.bazzi_text: But if youpl turn away, then I have conveyed to you what I was sent to you with. And my Lord will make other people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. My Lord is indeed a Constant Preserver over everything.
11:57.qunbul_text: But if they turn away, then I have conveyed to you what I was sent to you with. And my Lord will make other people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. My Lord is indeed a Constant Preserver over everything.
11:57.bazzi_ar_text: فَإِن تَّوَلَّوۡاْ فَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمُۥ مَا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ إِلَيۡكُمُۥۚ وَيَسۡتَخۡلِفُ رَبِّي قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمُۥ وَلَا تَضُرُّونَهُۥ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيظٞ
11:57.qunbul_ar_text: فَإِن تَوَلَّوۡاْ فَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمُۥ مَا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ إِلَيۡكُمُۥۚ وَيَسۡتَخۡلِفُ رَبِّي قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمُۥ وَلَا تَضُرُّونَهُۥ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيظٞ

11:81.base_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains, and let none of you look back. But not your wife —she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.bazzi_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.qunbul_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.bazzi_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَٱسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمُۥ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَا أَصَابَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ ٱلصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ ٱلصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
11:81.qunbul_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَٱسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمُۥ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَا أَصَابَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ ٱلصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ ٱلصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ

11:87.base_text: They said, “O Shuaib, does your prayer command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.bazzi_text: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.qunbul_text: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.bazzi_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ
11:87.qunbul_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ

11:108.base_text: And as for the ones who have been granted happiness, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.bazzi_text: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.qunbul_text: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
11:108.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ

11:111.base_text: Yet indeed, to every one of them your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.bazzi_text: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.qunbul_text: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمُۥ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
11:111.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمُۥ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ

11:123.base_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter is returned. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what youpl do.
11:123.bazzi_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.
11:123.qunbul_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.
11:123.bazzi_ar_text: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُۥ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
11:123.qunbul_ar_text: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُۥ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

12:7.base_text: Very truly, there have been signs in Joseph and his brothers for the askers.
12:7.bazzi_text: Very truly, there has been a sign in Joseph and his brothers for the askers.
12:7.qunbul_text: Very truly, there has been a sign in Joseph and his brothers for the askers.
12:7.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ لَّقَدۡ كَانَ فِي يُوسُفَ وَإِخۡوَتِهِۦ ءَايَتٞ لِّلسَّآئِلِينَ
12:7.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ لَّقَدۡ كَانَ فِي يُوسُفَ وَإِخۡوَتِهِۦ ءَايَتٞ لِّلسَّآئِلِينَ

12:12.base_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that he may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.bazzi_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that we may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.qunbul_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that we may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.bazzi_ar_text: أَرۡسِلۡهُۥ مَعَنَا غَدٗا نَّرۡتَعِ وَنَلۡعَبۡ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
12:12.qunbul_ar_text: أَرۡسِلۡهُۥ مَعَنَا غَدٗا نَّرۡتَعِ وَنَلۡعَبۡ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ

12:19.base_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.bazzi_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings for me! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.qunbul_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings for me! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.bazzi_ar_text: وَجَآءَتۡ سَيَّارَةٞ فَأَرۡسَلُواْ وَارِدَهُمُۥ فَأَدۡلَىٰ دَلۡوَهُۥۖ قَالَ يَٰبُشۡرَٰىَ هَٰذَا غُلَٰمٞۚ وَأَسَرُّوهُۥ بِضَٰعَةٗۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ
12:19.qunbul_ar_text: وَجَآءَتۡ سَيَّارَةٞ فَأَرۡسَلُواْ وَارِدَهُمُۥ فَأَدۡلَىٰ دَلۡوَهُۥۖ قَالَ يَٰبُشۡرَٰىَ هَٰذَا غُلَٰمٞۚ وَأَسَرُّوهُۥ بِضَٰعَةٗۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ

12:24.base_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere chosen servants.
12:24.bazzi_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere servants.
12:24.qunbul_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere servants.
12:24.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ هَمَّتۡ بِهِۦۖ وَهَمَّ بِهَا لَوۡلَا أَن رَّءَا بُرۡهَٰنَ رَبِّهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنَصۡرِفَ عَنۡهُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَٱلۡفَحۡشَآءَۚ ا۪نَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُخۡلِصِينَ
12:24.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ هَمَّتۡ بِهِۦۖ وَهَمَّ بِهَا لَوۡلَا أَن رَّءَا بُرۡهَٰنَ رَبِّهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنَصۡرِفَ عَنۡهُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَٱلۡفَحۡشَآءَۚ ا۪نَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُخۡلِصِينَ

12:56.base_text: And thus We established Joseph in the land to live therein wherever he so willed. We reach with Our mercy whomever We will, and We never waste the reward of those who excel in doing good.
12:56.bazzi_text: And thus We established Joseph in the land to live therein wherever We so willed. We reach with Our mercy whomever We will, and We never waste the reward of those who excel in doing good.
12:56.qunbul_text: And thus We established Joseph in the land to live therein wherever We so willed. We reach with Our mercy whomever We will, and We never waste the reward of those who excel in doing good.
12:56.bazzi_ar_text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَكَّنَّا لِيُوسُفَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَتَبَوَّأُ مِنۡهَا حَيۡثُ نَشَآءُۚ نُصِيبُ بِرَحۡمَتِنَا مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا نُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
12:56.qunbul_ar_text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَكَّنَّا لِيُوسُفَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَتَبَوَّأُ مِنۡهَا حَيۡثُ نَشَآءُۚ نُصِيبُ بِرَحۡمَتِنَا مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا نُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ

12:62.base_text: So he said to his young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.bazzi_text: So he said to his few young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.qunbul_text: So he said to his few young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيَتِهِ ٱجۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمُۥ فِي رِحَالِهِمُۥ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَعۡرِفُونَهَا إِذَا ٱنقَلَبُواْ إِلَىٰ أَهۡلِهِمُۥ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَرۡجِعُونَ
12:62.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيَتِهِ ٱجۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمُۥ فِي رِحَالِهِمُۥ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَعۡرِفُونَهَا إِذَا ٱنقَلَبُواْ إِلَىٰ أَهۡلِهِمُۥ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَرۡجِعُونَ

12:76.base_text: So he began with their bags before his brother’s bag, then he extracted it from his brother’s bag. Thus We plotted for Joseph; he could not have seized his brother according to the king’s religion unless Allah wills. We elevate by degrees whomever We so will. For above everyone who has knowledge, there is One who is All-Knowing.
12:76.bazzi_text: We elevate the degrees (ranks) of whomever . . .
12:76.qunbul_text: We elevate the degrees (ranks) of whomever . . .
12:76.bazzi_ar_text: فَبَدَأَ بِأَوۡعِيَتِهِمُۥ قَبۡلَ وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۦ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَخۡرَجَهَا مِن وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ كِدۡنَا لِيُوسُفَۖ مَا كَانَ لِيَأۡخُذَ أَخَاهُۥ فِي دِينِ ٱلۡمَلِكِ إِلَّا أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ نَرۡفَعُ دَرَجَٰتِ مَن نَّشَآءُۗ وَفَوۡقَ كُلِّ ذِي عِلۡمٍ عَلِيمٞ
12:76.qunbul_ar_text: فَبَدَأَ بِأَوۡعِيَتِهِمُۥ قَبۡلَ وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۦ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَخۡرَجَهَا مِن وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ كِدۡنَا لِيُوسُفَۖ مَا كَانَ لِيَأۡخُذَ أَخَاهُۥ فِي دِينِ ٱلۡمَلِكِ إِلَّا أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ نَرۡفَعُ دَرَجَٰتِ مَن نَّشَآءُۗ وَفَوۡقَ كُلِّ ذِي عِلۡمٍ عَلِيمٞ

12:90.base_text: They said, “Can it be that you really are Joseph?” He said, “I am Joseph, and this is my brother. Allah has certainly been gracious to us; indeed, whoever is mindful (of God) and endures patiently—indeed, Allah never wastes the reward of those who excel in doing good.”
12:90.bazzi_ar_text: قَالُواْ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ يُوسُفُۖ قَالَ أَنَا۠ يُوسُفُ وَهَٰذَا أَخِيۖ قَدۡ مَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَاۖ إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَتَّقِ وَيَصۡبِرۡ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
12:90.qunbul_ar_text: قَالُواْ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ يُوسُفُۖ قَالَ أَنَا۠ يُوسُفُ وَهَٰذَا أَخِيۖ قَدۡ مَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَاۖ إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَتَّقِۦ وَيَصۡبِرۡ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ

12:109.base_text: And in no way did We send (any messengers) before yousg except men to whom We reveal, from among the people of the towns. Have they not journeyed through the earth and looked at what the outcome was for those before them? The Home of the Hereafter is surely better for those who have been mindful (of God). Do youpl not reason?
12:109.bazzi_ar_text: وَمَا أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمُۥۗ وَلَدَارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
12:109.qunbul_ar_text: وَمَا أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمُۥۗ وَلَدَارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ

12:110.base_text: Until, when the messengers had completely despaired and thought that they had been lied to (by their own selves), Our support came to them. Then whomever We willed was delivered, and Our chastisement is never turned back from the criminal people.
12:110.bazzi_text: Then We save whomever We will . . .
12:110.qunbul_text: Then We save whomever We will . . .
12:110.bazzi_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا ٱسۡتَٰيَسَ ٱلرُّسُلُ وَظَنُّواْ أَنَّهُمُۥ قَدۡ كُذِّبُواْ جَآءَهُمُۥ نَصۡرُنَا فَنُـۨجِي مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا يُرَدُّ بَأۡسُنَا عَنِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
12:110.qunbul_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا ٱسۡتَيۡـَٔسَ ٱلرُّسُلُ وَظَنُّواْ أَنَّهُمُۥ قَدۡ كُذِّبُواْ جَآءَهُمُۥ نَصۡرُنَا فَنُـۨجِي مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا يُرَدُّ بَأۡسُنَا عَنِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ

13:17.base_text: He sent down water from the sky, so valleys flowed—each according to its capacity—and the current carried swelling froth. And from what they burn in fire, seeking to make ornaments or utensils, comes a similar froth. Thus Allah exemplifies truth and falsehood: so as for the froth—it fades away, and as for what benefits mankind—it remains in the earth; thus Allah sets forth parables.
13:17.bazzi_ar_text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَٱحۡتَمَلَ ٱلسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ وَمِمَّا تُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِۦ فِي ٱلنَّارِ ٱبۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ ٱلنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ
13:17.qunbul_ar_text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَٱحۡتَمَلَ ٱلسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ وَمِمَّا تُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِۦ فِي ٱلنَّارِ ٱبۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ ٱلنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ

13:33.base_text: Is the One Who is watchful over what every single self has earned…? Yet they set up associates to Allah. Say, “Namepl them! Or are you to inform Him as to what He knows not in the earth? Or is it a show of words?” Rather, the scheming of those who have denied has been adorned for them, and they were barred from the way. And whomever Allah leads astray, no guide shall there ever be for him.
13:33.bazzi_ar_text: أَفَمَنۡ هُوَ قَآئِمٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۗ وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ شُرَكَآءَ قُلۡ سَمُّوهُمُۥۚ أَمۡ تُنَبِّـُٔونَهُۥ بِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَم بِظَٰهِرٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۗ بَلۡ زُيِّنَ لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مَكۡرُهُمُۥ وَصَدُّواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِۗ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادٖ
13:33.qunbul_ar_text: أَفَمَنۡ هُوَ قَآئِمٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۗ وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ شُرَكَآءَ قُلۡ سَمُّوهُمُۥۚ أَمۡ تُنَبِّـُٔونَهُۥ بِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَم بِظَٰهِرٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۗ بَلۡ زُيِّنَ لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مَكۡرُهُمُۥ وَصَدُّواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِۗ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادِۦ

13:42.base_text: And the ones who came before them had schemed (as well), yet to Allah belongs all scheming; He knows what every single self earns. And the deniers will know to whom belongs the Ultimate Dwelling.
13:42.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَدۡ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمُۥ فَلِلَّهِ ٱلۡمَكۡرُ جَمِيعٗاۖ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَكۡسِبُ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُ لِمَنۡ عُقۡبَى ٱلدَّارِ
13:42.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَدۡ مَكَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمُۥ فَلِلَّهِ ٱلۡمَكۡرُ جَمِيعٗاۖ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَكۡسِبُ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُ لِمَنۡ عُقۡبَى ٱلدَّارِ

14:30.base_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to make (others) stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.bazzi_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.qunbul_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.bazzi_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ
14:30.qunbul_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ

15:8.base_text: We bestow not the angels from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.bazzi_text: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.qunbul_text: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.bazzi_ar_text: مَآ تَّنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
15:8.qunbul_ar_text: مَا تَنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ

15:40.base_text: except for Your sincere chosen servants among them.”
15:40.bazzi_text: except for Your sincere servants among them.”
15:40.qunbul_text: except for Your sincere servants among them.”

15:54.base_text: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give?”
15:54.bazzi_text: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”
15:54.qunbul_text: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”
15:54.bazzi_ar_text: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُوٓنِّ
15:54.qunbul_ar_text: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُوٓنِّ

16:2.base_text: He bestows the angels from on high with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.bazzi_text: He sends down the angels with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.qunbul_text: He sends down the angels with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.bazzi_ar_text: يُنزِلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنۡ أَمۡرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ أَنۡ أَنذِرُواْ أَنَّهُۥ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ
16:2.qunbul_ar_text: يُنزِلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنۡ أَمۡرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ أَنۡ أَنذِرُواْ أَنَّهُۥ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ

16:12.base_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon. And the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.bazzi_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon and the stars—(all) subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.qunbul_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon and the stars—(all) subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.bazzi_ar_text: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَٰتِۭ بِأَمۡرِهِۦۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
16:12.qunbul_ar_text: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَٰتِۭ بِأَمۡرِهِۦۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ

16:17.base_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you never remind yourselves?
16:17.bazzi_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you not constantly remember?
16:17.qunbul_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you not constantly remember?
16:17.bazzi_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
16:17.qunbul_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

16:20.base_text: Yet those they call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.bazzi_text: Yet those you call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.qunbul_text: Yet those you call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخۡلُقُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَهُمُۥ يُخۡلَقُونَ
16:20.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَخۡلُقُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَهُمُۥ يُخۡلَقُونَ

16:37.base_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) Allah surely does not guide whomever He leads astray, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.bazzi_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) whomever Allah leads astray surely cannot be guided, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.qunbul_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) whomever Allah leads astray surely cannot be guided, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.bazzi_ar_text: إِن تَحۡرِصۡ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمُۥ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُهۡدَيٰ مَن يُضِلُّۖ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ مِن نَّٰصِرِينَ
16:37.qunbul_ar_text: إِن تَحۡرِصۡ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمُۥ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُهۡدَيٰ مَن يُضِلُّۖ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ مِن نَّٰصِرِينَ

16:90.base_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may remind yourselves.
16:90.bazzi_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may constantly remember.
16:90.qunbul_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may constantly remember.
16:90.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأۡمُرُ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَٱلۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمُۥ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
16:90.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأۡمُرُ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَٱلۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمُۥ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

16:101.base_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He bestows from on high —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.bazzi_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He sends down —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.qunbul_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He sends down —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِذَا بَدَّلۡنَا ءَايَةٗ مَّكَانَ ءَايَةٖ وَٱللَّهُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُنزِلُ قَالُواْ إِنَّمَا أَنتَ مُفۡتَرِۭۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمُۥ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
16:101.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِذَا بَدَّلۡنَا ءَايَةٗ مَّكَانَ ءَايَةٖ وَٱللَّهُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُنزِلُ قَالُواْ إِنَّمَا أَنتَ مُفۡتَرِۭۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمُۥ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ

17:38.base_text: All of that— its evil has always been disliked by your Lord.
17:38.bazzi_text: All of that has always been an evil deed before yoursg Lord (and) disliked.
17:38.qunbul_text: All of that has always been an evil deed before yoursg Lord (and) disliked.
17:38.bazzi_ar_text: كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهٗا
17:38.qunbul_ar_text: كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهٗا

17:68.base_text: Are you confident that He will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.bazzi_text: Are you confident that We will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.qunbul_text: Are you confident that We will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.bazzi_ar_text: أَفَأَمِنتُمُۥ أَن نَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمُۥ جَانِبَ ٱلۡبَرِّ أَوۡ نُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ حَاصِبٗا ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمُۥ وَكِيلًا
17:68.qunbul_ar_text: أَفَأَمِنتُمُۥ أَن نَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمُۥ جَانِبَ ٱلۡبَرِّ أَوۡ نُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ حَاصِبٗا ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمُۥ وَكِيلًا

17:69.base_text: that He will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.bazzi_text: that We will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.qunbul_text: that We will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.bazzi_ar_text: أَمۡ أَمِنتُمُۥ أَن نُّعِيدَكُمُۥ فِيهِۦ تَارَةً أُخۡرَىٰ فَنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ قَاصِفٗا مِّنَ ٱلرِّيحِ فَنُغۡرِقَكُمُۥ بِمَا كَفَرۡتُمُۥ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمُۥ عَلَيۡنَا بِهِۦ تَبِيعٗا
17:69.qunbul_ar_text: أَمۡ أَمِنتُمُۥ أَن نُّعِيدَكُمُۥ فِيهِۦ تَارَةً أُخۡرَىٰ فَنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ قَاصِفٗا مِّنَ ٱلرِّيحِ فَنُغۡرِقَكُمُۥ بِمَا كَفَرۡتُمُۥ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمُۥ عَلَيۡنَا بِهِۦ تَبِيعٗا

17:95.base_text: Say, “If there were angels on earth
17:95.bazzi_text: He said, “If there were angels on earth
17:95.qunbul_text: He said, “If there were angels on earth
17:95.bazzi_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مَلَٰٓئِكَةٞ يَمۡشُونَ مُطۡمَئِنِّينَ لَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَلَكٗا رَّسُولٗا
17:95.qunbul_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مَلَٰٓئِكَةٞ يَمۡشُونَ مُطۡمَئِنِّينَ لَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَلَكٗا رَّسُولٗا

18:36.base_text: find something better than it as a destination
18:36.bazzi_text: find something better than them both as a destination
18:36.qunbul_text: find something better than them both as a destination
18:36.bazzi_ar_text: وَمَا أَظُنُّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ قَآئِمَةٗ وَلَئِن رُّدِدتُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي لَأَجِدَنَّ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُمَا مُنقَلَبٗا
18:36.qunbul_ar_text: وَمَا أَظُنُّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ قَآئِمَةٗ وَلَئِن رُّدِدتُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي لَأَجِدَنَّ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُمَا مُنقَلَبٗا

18:47.base_text: And on the day when We set the mountains in motion
18:47.bazzi_text: And on the day when the mountains are set in motion
18:47.qunbul_text: And on the day when the mountains are set in motion
18:47.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تُسَيَّرُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ وَتَرَى ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَارِزَةٗ وَحَشَرۡنَٰهُمُۥ فَلَمۡ نُغَادِرۡ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَحَدٗا
18:47.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تُسَيَّرُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ وَتَرَى ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَارِزَةٗ وَحَشَرۡنَٰهُمُۥ فَلَمۡ نُغَادِرۡ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَحَدٗا

18:55.base_text: or to have the punishment come upon them in many types
18:55.bazzi_text: or to have the punishment come upon them face to face
18:55.qunbul_text: or to have the punishment come upon them face to face
18:55.bazzi_ar_text: وَمَا مَنَعَ ٱلنَّاسَ أَن يُؤۡمِنُواْ إِذۡ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَّا أَن تَأۡتِيَهُمُۥ سُنَّةُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ أَوۡ يَأۡتِيَهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ قِبَلٗا
18:55.qunbul_ar_text: وَمَا مَنَعَ ٱلنَّاسَ أَن يُؤۡمِنُواْ إِذۡ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَّا أَن تَأۡتِيَهُمُۥ سُنَّةُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ أَوۡ يَأۡتِيَهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ قِبَلٗا

18:59.base_text: and We set an appointment for their moment of annihilation
18:59.bazzi_text: and We set an appointment for their annihilation
18:59.qunbul_text: and We set an appointment for their annihilation
18:59.bazzi_ar_text: وَتِلۡكَ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمُۥ لَمَّا ظَلَمُواْ وَجَعَلۡنَا لِمُهۡلَكِهِمُۥ مَوۡعِدٗا
18:59.qunbul_ar_text: وَتِلۡكَ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمُۥ لَمَّا ظَلَمُواْ وَجَعَلۡنَا لِمُهۡلَكِهِمُۥ مَوۡعِدٗا

18:74.base_text: He said, “Did you kill a sinless self which killed no one? Most surely, you have done something dreadful.”
18:74.bazzi_text: Did you kill an inherently sinless self . . .
18:74.qunbul_text: Did you kill an inherently sinless self . . .
18:74.bazzi_ar_text: فَٱنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا لَقِيَا غُلَٰمٗا فَقَتَلَهُۥ قَالَ أَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسٗا زَٰكِيَةَۢ بِغَيۡرِ نَفۡسٖ لَّقَدۡ جِئۡتَ شَيۡـٔٗا نُّكۡرٗا

18:77.base_text: He said, “If you wanted, you could have charged a reward for it.”

18:77.qunbul_text: He said, ‘If you had wanted, you could have taken a reward for it.’
18:77.bazzi_ar_text: فَٱنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَتَيَا أَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةٍ ٱسۡتَطۡعَمَا أَهۡلَهَا فَأَبَوۡاْ أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارٗا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُۥۖ قَالَ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ لَتَخِذۡتَ عَلَيۡهِۦ أَجۡرٗا
18:77.qunbul_ar_text: فَٱنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَتَيَا أَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةٍ ٱسۡتَطۡعَمَا أَهۡلَهَا فَأَبَوۡاْ أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارٗا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُۥۖ قَالَ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ لَتَخِذۡتَ عَلَيۡهِۦ أَجۡرٗا

18:88.base_text: But as for the one who has attained faith and has acted righteously, then for him is the excellent (reward) as repayment, and we will speak to him with ease regarding our command.

18:88.qunbul_text: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

18:98.base_text: He said, “This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes true, He will turn it into a flat surface.

19:24.bazzi_text: So the one beneath her called her:
19:24.qunbul_text: So the one beneath her called her:

19:24.qunbul_ar_text: فَنَادَىٰهَا مَن تَحۡتَهَا أَلَّا تَحۡزَنِي قَدۡ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيّٗا

19:34.base_text: That is Jesus, son of Mary—the word of truth about which they are skeptical.
19:34.bazzi_text: . . . son of Mary; (that is) the word of truth . . .
19:34.qunbul_text: . . . son of Mary; (that is) the word of truth . . .

19:51.qunbul_text: He was indeed sincere, and he was a messenger . . .

19:60.base_text: except for whoever repented and believed and acted righteously, for those shall enter the Garden and shall not be dealt with unjustly in any way—
19:60.bazzi_text: . . . shall be entered into the Garden . . .
19:60.qunbul_text: . . . shall be entered into the Garden . . .

19:73.base_text: And when Our signs are read to them, evident, those who have denied say to those who have attained faith, “Which of the two groups is better in position and fairer in company?”
19:73.bazzi_text: ‘Which of the two groups has a better dwelling place and is fairer in company?’
19:73.qunbul_text: ‘Which of the two groups has a better dwelling place and is fairer in company?’
19:73.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٖ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَيُّ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ خَيۡرٞ مُّقَامٗا وَأَحۡسَنُ نَدِيّٗا
19:73.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٖ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَيُّ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ خَيۡرٞ مُّقَامٗا وَأَحۡسَنُ نَدِيّٗا

21:104.base_text: On the day when We fold the heaven as the scribe rolls up scriptures. Just as We began the first creation, We restore it—a promise from Us. We will indeed act.

22:9.base_text: turning aside in contempt, to make (others) stray from the way of Allah; for him in the Earlier (Life) is disgrace, and on the Day of Resurrection We make him taste the punishment of burning:
22:9.bazzi_text: . . . to stray from the way of Allah . . .
22:9.qunbul_text: . . . to stray from the way of Allah . . .

22:23.base_text: Indeed, Allah enters those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they are decorated with bracelets of gold and (with) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
22:23.bazzi_text: . . . with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls . . .
22:23.qunbul_text: . . . with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls . . .
22:23.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُدۡخِلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمُۥ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ

22:25.base_text: Indeed, those who have denied and bar (others) from the way of Allah and from the Inviolable Mosque, which We have designated for all mankind equally, (including) the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor. And whoever wants any blasphemy unjustly therein—We will make him taste of a painful punishment.
22:25.bazzi_text: . . . which We have designated for all mankind, equally for the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor.
22:25.qunbul_text: . . . which We have designated for all mankind, equally for the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor.
22:25.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلۡنَٰهُۥ لِلنَّاسِ سَوَآءٌ ٱلۡعَٰكِفُ فِيهِۦ وَٱلۡبَادِۦۚ وَمَن يُرِدۡ فِيهِۦ بِإِلۡحَادِۭ بِظُلۡمٖ نُّذِقۡهُۥ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ
22:25.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلۡنَٰهُۥ لِلنَّاسِ سَوَآءٌ ٱلۡعَٰكِفُ فِيهِۦ وَٱلۡبَادِۦۚ وَمَن يُرِدۡ فِيهِۦ بِإِلۡحَادِۭ بِظُلۡمٖ نُّذِقۡهُۥ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ

22:38.base_text: Indeed, Allah defends those who have attained faith. Indeed, Allah does not love every treacherous staunch denier.
22:38.bazzi_text: Indeed, Allah repels (harm) from those who . . .
22:38.qunbul_text: Indeed, Allah repels (harm) from those who . . .
22:38.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَدۡفَعُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ خَوَّانٖ كَفُورٍ
22:38.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَدۡفَعُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ خَوَّانٖ كَفُورٍ

22:39.base_text: Permission has been granted to those who are combated, because they have been dealt with unjustly—and most surely Allah is Able to give them support:
22:39.bazzi_ar_text: أَذِنَ لِلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ ظُلِمُواْۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصۡرِهِمُۥ لَقَدِيرٌ
22:39.qunbul_ar_text: أَذِنَ لِلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ ظُلِمُواْۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصۡرِهِمُۥ لَقَدِيرٌ

22:40.base_text: those who have been unjustifiably evicted from their homes merely for saying, “Our Lord is Allah.” And were it not that Allah repels people by means of others, monasteries and churches and synagogues and mosques—where the name of Allah is mentioned frequently—would have been utterly demolished. And most surely, Allah will support whoever supports Him. Indeed, Allah is certainly All-Powerful, Almighty.
22:40.bazzi_ar_text: ٱلَّذِينَ أُخۡرِجُواْ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمُۥ بِغَيۡرِ حَقٍّ إِلَّا أَن يَقُولُواْ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُۗ وَلَوۡلَا دَفۡعُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلنَّاسَ بَعۡضَهُمُۥ بِبَعۡضٖ لَّهُدِمَتۡ صَوَٰمِعُ وَبِيَعٞ وَصَلَوَٰتٞ وَمَسَٰجِدُ يُذۡكَرُ فِيهَا ٱسۡمُ ٱللَّهِ كَثِيرٗاۗ وَلَيَنصُرَنَّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَقَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٌ
22:40.qunbul_ar_text: ٱلَّذِينَ أُخۡرِجُواْ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمُۥ بِغَيۡرِ حَقٍّ إِلَّا أَن يَقُولُواْ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُۗ وَلَوۡلَا دَفۡعُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلنَّاسَ بَعۡضَهُمُۥ بِبَعۡضٖ لَّهُدِمَتۡ صَوَٰمِعُ وَبِيَعٞ وَصَلَوَٰتٞ وَمَسَٰجِدُ يُذۡكَرُ فِيهَا ٱسۡمُ ٱللَّهِ كَثِيرٗاۗ وَلَيَنصُرَنَّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَقَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٌ

22:47.base_text: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. But Allah will not break His promise. And indeed, a single day with your Lord is like a thousand years of what you count.
22:47.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَكَ بِٱلۡعَذَابِ وَلَن يُخۡلِفَ ٱللَّهُ وَعۡدَهُۥۚ وَإِنَّ يَوۡمًا عِندَ رَبِّكَ كَأَلۡفِ سَنَةٖ مِّمَّا يَعُدُّونَ
22:47.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَكَ بِٱلۡعَذَابِ وَلَن يُخۡلِفَ ٱللَّهُ وَعۡدَهُۥۚ وَإِنَّ يَوۡمًا عِندَ رَبِّكَ كَأَلۡفِ سَنَةٖ مِّمَّا يَعُدُّونَ

22:51.base_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to challenge (the believers) —those are the fellows of purgatory.
22:51.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡاْ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
22:51.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡاْ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ

22:62.base_text: That is because Allah is the Truth, and because whatever they call upon apart from Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the All-High, the Supreme.
22:62.bazzi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَأَنَّ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ هُوَ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
22:62.qunbul_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَأَنَّ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ هُوَ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ

22:71.base_text: Yet they worship, apart from Allah, things for which He sent down no authority and what they have no knowledge of. And for the unjust there is no supporter.
22:71.bazzi_text: . . . things for which He bestowed no authority from on high . . .
22:71.qunbul_text: . . . things for which He bestowed no authority from on high . . .
22:71.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنزِلۡ بِهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا وَمَا لَيۡسَ لَهُمُۥ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٞۗ وَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٖ
22:71.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنزِلۡ بِهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا وَمَا لَيۡسَ لَهُمُۥ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٞۗ وَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٖ

23:8.base_text: And those who to their trusts and their covenant are faithful,

23:27.base_text: So We revealed to him: “Build the ship under Our eyes and according to Our revelation. And when Our command comes and the oven overflows, carry in it of each kind, a (male and female) couple, and your family except those of them against whom the word has already been pronounced. And do not speak to me concerning those who have done injustice; they will surely be drowned.”
23:27.bazzi_text: ‘…of each (male and female) kind, one couple…’
23:27.qunbul_text: ‘…of each (male and female) kind, one couple…’
23:27.bazzi_ar_text: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَا إِلَيۡهِۦ أَنِ ٱصۡنَعِ ٱلۡفُلۡكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَا وَوَحۡيِنَا فَإِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ فَٱسۡلُكۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ مِنۡهُمُۥۖ وَلَا تُخَٰطِبۡنِي فِي ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ إِنَّهُمُۥ مُغۡرَقُونَ
23:27.qunbul_ar_text: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَا إِلَيۡهِۦ أَنِ ٱصۡنَعِ ٱلۡفُلۡكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَا وَوَحۡيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآءَ ا۬مۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ فَٱسۡلُكۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ مِنۡهُمُۥۖ وَلَا تُخَٰطِبۡنِي فِي ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ إِنَّهُمُۥ مُغۡرَقُونَ

23:51-52.base_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. For indeed, this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”
23:51-52.bazzi_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. And (know) that this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”
23:51-52.qunbul_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. And (know) that this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”
23:51-52.bazzi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُواْ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَٱعۡمَلُواْ صَٰلِحًاۖ إِنِّي بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ عَلِيمٞ
23:51-52.qunbul_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُواْ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَٱعۡمَلُواْ صَٰلِحًاۖ إِنِّي بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ عَلِيمٞ

23:85.base_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, “Will you never remember?”
23:85.bazzi_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, ‘Will you not constantly remember?’
23:85.qunbul_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, ‘Will you not constantly remember?’

23:112.base_text: He said, “How long did you remain on earth in terms of number of years?”
23:112.bazzi_text: Say, ‘How long did you remain on earth in terms of number of years?’
23:112.qunbul_text: Say, ‘How long did you remain on earth in terms of number of years?’
23:112.bazzi_ar_text: قُلۡ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
23:112.qunbul_ar_text: قُلۡ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ

24:1.base_text: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may remind yourselves.
24:1.bazzi_text: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.
24:1.qunbul_text: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.
24:1.bazzi_ar_text: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
24:1.qunbul_ar_text: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

24:6.base_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then let the testimony of one of them be four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.bazzi_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.qunbul_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمُۥ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمُۥ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمُۥ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمُۥ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
24:6.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمُۥ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمُۥ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمُۥ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمُۥ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ

24:9.base_text: while the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.bazzi_text: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.qunbul_text: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
24:9.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ

24:34.base_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarifying signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.bazzi_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.qunbul_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمُۥ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
24:34.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمُۥ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ

24:40.base_text: Or (they are) like darkness(es) in an abysmal sea, covered by waves, above which are waves, above which are clouds—darkness(es), one upon the other. If one holds out his hand, he can hardly see it. For whomever Allah has not granted a light has no light.
24:40.bazzi_text: Or (they are) like darkness(es) in an abysmal sea, covered by waves, above which are waves, above which are clouds of darkness(es), one upon the other. If one holds out his hand, he can hardly see it. For whomever Allah has not granted a light has no light.
24:40.qunbul_text: Or (they are) like darkness(es) in an abysmal sea, covered by waves, above which are waves, above which are clouds. (These) darkness(es) (are) one upon the other. If one holds out his hand, he can hardly see it. For whomever Allah has not granted a light has no light.
24:40.bazzi_ar_text: أَوۡ كَظُلُمَٰتٖ فِي بَحۡرٖ لُّجِّيّٖ يَغۡشَىٰهُۥ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ سَحَابُ ظُلُمَٰتِۭ بَعۡضُهَا فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍ إِذَا أَخۡرَجَ يَدَهُۥ لَمۡ يَكَدۡ يَرَىٰهَاۗ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَجۡعَلِ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ نُورٗا فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن نُّورٍ
24:40.qunbul_ar_text: أَوۡ كَظُلُمَٰتٖ فِي بَحۡرٖ لُّجِّيّٖ يَغۡشَىٰهُۥ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ سَحَابٞۚ ظُلُمَٰتِۭ بَعۡضُهَا فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍ إِذَا أَخۡرَجَ يَدَهُۥ لَمۡ يَكَدۡ يَرَىٰهَاۗ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَجۡعَلِ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ نُورٗا فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن نُّورٍ

24:43.base_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He sends down from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.bazzi_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.qunbul_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.bazzi_ar_text: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
24:43.qunbul_ar_text: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ

24:46.base_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarifying signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.bazzi_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.qunbul_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.bazzi_ar_text: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
24:46.qunbul_ar_text: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِۜرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ

24:58.base_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering) on three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
24:58.bazzi_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
24:58.qunbul_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
24:58.bazzi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمُۥ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمُۥۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ بَعۡضُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
24:58.qunbul_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمُۥ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمُۥۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ بَعۡضُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ

25:10.base_text: Supremely Blessed be the One Who, if He so willed, would provide you sg with better than that—Gardens beneath which rivers flow—and make for you palaces.
25:10.bazzi_text: Supremely Blessed be the One Who, if He so willed, would provide you sg with better than that—Gardens beneath which rivers flow. And He would make for you palaces.
25:10.qunbul_text: Supremely Blessed be the One Who, if He so willed, would provide you sg with better than that—Gardens beneath which rivers flow. And He would make for you palaces.
25:10.bazzi_ar_text: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي إِن شَآءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيۡرٗا مِّن ذَٰلِكَ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ وَيَجۡعَلُ لَكَ قُصُورَۢا
25:10.qunbul_ar_text: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي إِن شَآءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيۡرٗا مِّن ذَٰلِكَ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ وَيَجۡعَلُ لَكَ قُصُورَۢا

25:19.base_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so you can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.bazzi_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so they can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.qunbul_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so they can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.bazzi_ar_text: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوكُمُۥ بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ صَرۡفٗا وَلَا نَصۡرٗاۚ وَمَن يَظۡلِم مِّنكُمُۥ نُذِقۡهُۥ عَذَابٗا كَبِيرٗا
25:19.qunbul_ar_text: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوكُمُۥ بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ صَرۡفٗا وَلَا نَصۡرٗاۚ وَمَن يَظۡلِم مِّنكُمُۥ نُذِقۡهُۥ عَذَابٗا كَبِيرٗا

25:25.base_text: And it is the day when the sky is cleft with clouds and the angels were sent down in streams.
25:25.bazzi_text: And it is the day when the sky is cleft with clouds and We send down the angels in streams.
25:25.qunbul_text: And it is the day when the sky is cleft with clouds and We send down the angels in streams.
25:25.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلۡغَمَٰمِ وَنُنزِلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ تَنزِيلًا
25:25.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلۡغَمَٰمِ وَنُنزِلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ تَنزِيلًا

25:48.base_text: And it is He Who sent the winds as heralds of glad tidings ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.bazzi_text: And it is He Who sent the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.qunbul_text: And it is He Who sent the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.bazzi_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي أَرۡسَلَ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ طَهُورٗا
25:48.qunbul_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي أَرۡسَلَ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ طَهُورٗا

26:4.base_text: If We will, We can bestow upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.bazzi_text: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.qunbul_text: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.bazzi_ar_text: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ اَ۟يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمُۥ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
26:4.qunbul_ar_text: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ اَ۟يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمُۥ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ

26:56.bazzi_text: But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
26:56.qunbul_text: But indeed, we are constantly cautious.

26:137.base_text: This is nothing but the character of the ancients,
26:137.bazzi_text: This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,
26:137.qunbul_text: This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,

26:149.base_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with skill?
26:149.bazzi_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
26:149.qunbul_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?

26:187.base_text: So make pieces from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.bazzi_text: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.qunbul_text: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.bazzi_ar_text: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآ۟ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
26:187.qunbul_ar_text: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ا۪ن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ

27:7.base_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand, a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.bazzi_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.qunbul_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.bazzi_ar_text: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُمُۥ مِنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُمُۥ بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَصۡطَلُونَ
27:7.qunbul_ar_text: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُمُۥ مِنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُمُۥ بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَصۡطَلُونَ

27:25.base_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever you hide and whatever you make public.
27:25.bazzi_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.
27:25.qunbul_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.
27:25.bazzi_ar_text: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
27:25.qunbul_ar_text: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ

27:51.base_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was that We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.bazzi_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.qunbul_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.bazzi_ar_text: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمُۥ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَقَوۡمَهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
27:51.qunbul_ar_text: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمُۥ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَقَوۡمَهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ

27:59.base_text: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what they associate?”
27:59.bazzi_text: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”
27:59.qunbul_text: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”
27:59.bazzi_ar_text: قُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَىٰۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ أَمَّا تُشۡرِكُونَ
27:59.qunbul_ar_text: قُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَىٰۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ أَمَّا تُشۡرِكُونَ

27:62.base_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you remind yourselves.
27:62.bazzi_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.
27:62.qunbul_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.
27:62.bazzi_ar_text: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُۥ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمُۥ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
