27:62.qunbul_ar_text: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُۥ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمُۥ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

27:63.base_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings before His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.bazzi_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.qunbul_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.bazzi_ar_text: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمُۥ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
27:63.qunbul_ar_text: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمُۥ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ

27:66.base_text: rather, their knowledge has been reached in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.bazzi_text: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.qunbul_text: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.bazzi_ar_text: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمُۥ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُمُۥ مِنۡهَا عَمُونَ
27:66.qunbul_ar_text: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمُۥ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُمُۥ مِنۡهَا عَمُونَ

27:80.base_text: Indeed, you cannot make the dead hear, nor can you make the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.
27:80.bazzi_text: Indeed, you cannot make the dead hear, nor can the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.
27:80.qunbul_text: Indeed, you cannot make the dead hear, nor can the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.
27:80.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
27:80.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ

27:82.base_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will tell them that mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.bazzi_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.qunbul_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمُۥ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمُۥ إِنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
27:82.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمُۥ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمُۥ إِنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ

27:88.base_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what you do.
27:88.bazzi_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.
27:88.qunbul_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.
27:88.bazzi_ar_text: وَتَرَى ٱلۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
27:88.qunbul_ar_text: وَتَرَى ٱلۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ

27:89.base_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from horror on that day,
27:89.bazzi_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,
27:89.qunbul_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,
27:89.bazzi_ar_text: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُمُۥ مِن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
27:89.qunbul_ar_text: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُمُۥ مِن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ

27:93.base_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what you do.”
27:93.bazzi_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”
27:93.qunbul_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”
27:93.bazzi_ar_text: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
27:93.qunbul_ar_text: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

28:37.base_text: Thus Moses said, “My Lord knows better of the one who brings guidance from Him and who will have the future outcome of the Home; indeed, the unjust never succeed.”
28:37.bazzi_text: Moses said, “My Lord knows better of the one who brings guidance from Him and who will have the future outcome of the Home; indeed, the unjust never succeed.”
28:37.qunbul_text: Moses said, “My Lord knows better of the one who brings guidance from Him and who will have the future outcome of the Home; indeed, the unjust never succeed.”
28:37.bazzi_ar_text: قَالَ مُوسَىٰ رَبِّيَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ مِنۡ عِندِهِۦ وَمَن تَكُونُ لَهُۥ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلدَّارِۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
28:37.qunbul_ar_text: قَالَ مُوسَىٰ رَبِّيَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ مِنۡ عِندِهِۦ وَمَن تَكُونُ لَهُۥ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلدَّارِۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ

28:48.base_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two works of sorcery, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.bazzi_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two sorcerers, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.qunbul_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two sorcerers, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.bazzi_ar_text: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلۡحَقُّ مِنۡ عِندِنَا قَالُواْ لَوۡلَا أُوتِيَ مِثۡلَ مَا أُوتِيَ مُوسَىٰۚ أَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أُوتِيَ مُوسَىٰ مِن قَبۡلُۖ قَالُواْ سَٰحِرَانِ تَظَٰهَرَا وَقَالُواْ إِنَّا بِكُلّٖ كَٰفِرُونَ
28:48.qunbul_ar_text: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلۡحَقُّ مِنۡ عِندِنَا قَالُواْ لَوۡلَا أُوتِيَ مِثۡلَ مَا أُوتِيَ مُوسَىٰۚ أَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أُوتِيَ مُوسَىٰ مِن قَبۡلُۖ قَالُواْ سَٰحِرَانِ تَظَٰهَرَا وَقَالُواْ إِنَّا بِكُلّٖ كَٰفِرُونَ

28:82.base_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, He would have caused it to swallow us. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.bazzi_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, we would have been swallowed. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.qunbul_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, we would have been swallowed. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.bazzi_ar_text: وَأَصۡبَحَ ٱلَّذِينَ تَمَنَّوۡاْ مَكَانَهُۥ بِٱلۡأَمۡسِ يَقُولُونَ وَيۡكَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبۡسُطُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقۡدِرُۖ لَوۡلَا أَن مَّنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا لَخُسِفَ بِنَاۖ وَيۡكَأَنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ
28:82.qunbul_ar_text: وَأَصۡبَحَ ٱلَّذِينَ تَمَنَّوۡاْ مَكَانَهُۥ بِٱلۡأَمۡسِ يَقُولُونَ وَيۡكَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبۡسُطُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقۡدِرُۖ لَوۡلَا أَن مَّنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا لَخُسِفَ بِنَاۖ وَيۡكَأَنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ

29:33.base_text: Then, when Our messengers came to Lot, he was troubled and distressed on their account. But they said, “Do not fear nor grieve; we will deliver you and your family, except for your wife; she has become one of those who linger behind.
29:33.bazzi_text: Then, when Our messengers came to Lot, he was troubled and distressed on their account. But they said, “Do not fear nor grieve; we will save you and your family, except for your wife; she has become one of those who linger behind.
29:33.qunbul_text: Then, when Our messengers came to Lot, he was troubled and distressed on their account. But they said, “Do not fear nor grieve; we will save you and your family, except for your wife; she has become one of those who linger behind.
29:33.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَمَّا أَن جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا لُوطٗا سِيٓءَ بِهِمُۥ وَضَاقَ بِهِمُۥ ذَرۡعٗاۖ وَقَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ إِنَّا مُنجُوكَ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَكَ كَانَتۡ مِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
29:33.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَمَّا أَن جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا لُوطٗا سِيٓءَ بِهِمُۥ وَضَاقَ بِهِمُۥ ذَرۡعٗاۖ وَقَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ إِنَّا مُنجُوكَ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَكَ كَانَتۡ مِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ

29:42.base_text: Indeed, Allah knows whatever thing they call upon apart from Him, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.
29:42.bazzi_text: Indeed, Allah knows whatever thing youpl call upon apart from Him, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.
29:42.qunbul_text: Indeed, Allah knows whatever thing youpl call upon apart from Him, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.
29:42.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَيۡءٖۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
29:42.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مِن شَيۡءٖۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ

29:50.base_text: And they said, “Why are no signs sent down to him from his Lord?” Saysg, “Surely the signs are only in the Providence of Allah, and surely I am only an evident warner.”
29:50.bazzi_text: And they said, “Why is no sign sent down to him from his Lord?” Saysg, “Surely the signs are only in the Providence of Allah, and surely I am only an evident warner.”
29:50.qunbul_text: And they said, “Why is no sign sent down to him from his Lord?” Saysg, “Surely the signs are only in the Providence of Allah, and surely I am only an evident warner.”
29:50.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡلَا أُنزِلَ عَلَيۡهِۦ ءَايَتٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦۚ قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَا أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
29:50.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡلَا أُنزِلَ عَلَيۡهِۦ ءَايَتٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦۚ قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَا أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ

29:55.base_text: On the day when the punishment envelops them from above them and from beneath their feet, and He says, “Taste what you used to do!”
29:55.bazzi_ar_text: يَوۡمَ يَغۡشَىٰهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ مِن فَوۡقِهِمُۥ وَمِن تَحۡتِ أَرۡجُلِهِمُۥ وَنَقُولُ ذُوقُواْ مَا كُنتُمُۥ تَعۡمَلُونَ
29:55.qunbul_ar_text: يَوۡمَ يَغۡشَىٰهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ مِن فَوۡقِهِمُۥ وَمِن تَحۡتِ أَرۡجُلِهِمُۥ وَنَقُولُ ذُوقُواْ مَا كُنتُمُۥ تَعۡمَلُونَ

29:66.base_text: so that they deny whatever We have brought them and so that they enjoy, for they will eventually know!
29:66.bazzi_ar_text: لِيَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَلۡيَتَمَتَّعُواْۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
29:66.qunbul_ar_text: لِيَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَلۡيَتَمَتَّعُواْۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ

30:22.base_text: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth, and the diversity of your pl tongues and colors; indeed, in that are signs for those who know.
30:22.bazzi_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ خَلۡقُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَٱخۡتِلَٰفُ أَلۡسِنَتِكُمُۥ وَأَلۡوَٰنِكُمُۥۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
30:22.qunbul_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ خَلۡقُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَٱخۡتِلَٰفُ أَلۡسِنَتِكُمُۥ وَأَلۡوَٰنِكُمُۥۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ

30:24.base_text: And of His signs is that He shows youpl lightning, causing fear and ardent hope. And He bestows water from the sky, and with it He revives the earth after its death; indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
30:24.bazzi_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ ٱلۡبَرۡقَ خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعٗا وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَيُحۡيِۦ بِهِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
30:24.qunbul_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ ٱلۡبَرۡقَ خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعٗا وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَيُحۡيِۦ بِهِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ

30:39.base_text: And whatever youpl have brought in usury so that it increases through people’s money is not (considered) an increase with Allah, but whatever you have brought as purifying charity, seeking Allah’s Countenance—those are the multipliers.
30:39.bazzi_text: And whatever youpl have come up with in usury so that it increases
30:39.qunbul_text: And whatever youpl have come up with in usury so that it increases
30:39.bazzi_ar_text: وَمَا أَتَيۡتُمُۥ مِن رِّبٗا لِّيَرۡبُوَاْ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَلَا يَرۡبُواْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِۖ وَمَا ءَاتَيۡتُمُۥ مِن زَكَوٰةٖ تُرِيدُونَ وَجۡهَ ٱللَّهِ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُضۡعِفُونَ
30:39.qunbul_ar_text: وَمَا أَتَيۡتُمُۥ مِن رِّبٗا لِّيَرۡبُوَاْ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَلَا يَرۡبُواْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِۖ وَمَا ءَاتَيۡتُمُۥ مِن زَكَوٰةٖ تُرِيدُونَ وَجۡهَ ٱللَّهِ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُضۡعِفُونَ

30:41.base_text: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea because of what people’s hands have earned, so that He may make them taste some of what they have done, that they may return.
30:41.bazzi_text: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea because of what people’s hands have earned, so that He may make them taste some of what they have done, that they may return.
30:41.qunbul_text: so that We may make them taste
30:41.bazzi_ar_text: ظَهَرَ ٱلۡفَسَادُ فِي ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ أَيۡدِي ٱلنَّاسِ لِيُذِيقَهُمُۥ بَعۡضَ ٱلَّذِي عَمِلُواْ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَرۡجِعُونَ
30:41.qunbul_ar_text: ظَهَرَ ٱلۡفَسَادُ فِي ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ أَيۡدِي ٱلنَّاسِ لِنُذِيقَهُمُۥ بَعۡضَ ٱلَّذِي عَمِلُواْ لَعَلَّهُمُۥ يَرۡجِعُونَ

30:48.base_text: Allah is the One Who sends the winds so they stir up clouds, then He spreads them in the sky as He wills and makes them into pieces, then you see rain drops coming out from their midst; then when He makes it fall upon whom He wills of His servants, there they are, anticipating glad tidings
30:48.bazzi_ar_text: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابٗا فَيَبۡسُطُهُۥ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيۡفَ يَشَآءُ وَيَجۡعَلُهُۥ كِسَفٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦۖ فَإِذَا أَصَابَ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ إِذَا هُمُۥ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
30:48.qunbul_ar_text: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابٗا فَيَبۡسُطُهُۥ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيۡفَ يَشَآءُ وَيَجۡعَلُهُۥ كِسَفٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦۖ فَإِذَا أَصَابَ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ إِذَا هُمُۥ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ

30:49.base_text: although before it was bestowed upon them from on high they were indeed in despair.
30:49.bazzi_text: before it was sent down upon them they were
30:49.qunbul_text: before it was sent down upon them they were
30:49.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِن كَانُواْ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِن قَبۡلِهِۦ لَمُبۡلِسِينَ
30:49.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِن كَانُواْ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِن قَبۡلِهِۦ لَمُبۡلِسِينَ

30:50.base_text: So look sg at the effects of Allah’s mercy—how He revives the earth after its death; indeed, He is the Reviver of the dead, and He is All-Powerful over everything.
30:50.bazzi_ar_text: فَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ أَثَرِ رَحۡمَتِ ٱللَّهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ
30:50.qunbul_ar_text: فَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ أَثَرِ رَحۡمَتِ ٱللَّهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ

30:52.base_text: So surely yousg cannot make the dead hear, nor can you make the deaf hear the call when they turn away, fleeing.
30:52.bazzi_text: nor can the deaf hear the call
30:52.qunbul_text: nor can the deaf hear the call
30:52.bazzi_ar_text: فَإِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
30:52.qunbul_ar_text: فَإِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ

31:6.base_text: And among mankind is one who trades in distracting tales to make (people) stray from the way of Allah without knowledge, and to take it for a mockery; for those is a demeaning punishment.
31:6.bazzi_ar_text: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَشۡتَرِي لَهۡوَ ٱلۡحَدِيثِ لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا هُزُؤًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُۥ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
31:6.qunbul_ar_text: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَشۡتَرِي لَهۡوَ ٱلۡحَدِيثِ لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا هُزُؤًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُۥ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ

31:30.base_text: That is because Allah is the Truth, and because what they call upon apart from Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the All-High, the Supreme.
31:30.bazzi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَأَنَّ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
31:30.qunbul_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَأَنَّ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ

31:34.base_text: Indeed, with Allah rests the knowledge of the Hour. And He bestows the rain from on high and He knows what the wombs contain. But in no way does any soul know what it will earn tomorrow, and in no way does any soul know in what land it will die; indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Aware.
31:34.bazzi_text: and He sends down the rain and He knows
31:34.qunbul_text: and He sends down the rain and He knows
31:34.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَيُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡحَامِۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسٞ مَّاذَا تَكۡسِبُ غَدٗاۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسُۢ بِأَيِّ أَرۡضٖ تَمُوتُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرُۢ
31:34.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَيُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡحَامِۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسٞ مَّاذَا تَكۡسِبُ غَدٗاۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسُۢ بِأَيِّ أَرۡضٖ تَمُوتُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرُۢ

32:7.base_text: created, and He originated the creation of man from clay,
32:7.bazzi_text: . . . Who has made everything excellent regarding its composition, and He . . .
32:7.qunbul_text: . . . Who has made everything excellent regarding its composition, and He . . .
32:7.bazzi_ar_text: ٱلَّذِي أَحۡسَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ وَبَدَأَ خَلۡقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ مِن طِينٖ
32:7.qunbul_ar_text: ٱلَّذِي أَحۡسَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ وَبَدَأَ خَلۡقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ مِن طِينٖ

33:13.base_text: Recall, too, when a faction of them said, “O people of Yathrib, there is no staying for you here, so retreat.”
33:13.bazzi_text: . . . there is no standing-place for you here . . .
33:13.qunbul_text: . . . there is no standing-place for you here . . .
33:13.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِذۡ قَالَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ يَٰأَهۡلَ يَثۡرِبَ لَا مَقَامَ لَكُمُۥ فَٱرۡجِعُواْۚ وَيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنُ فَرِيقٞ مِّنۡهُمُ ٱلنَّبِيَّ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ بِيُوتَنَا عَوۡرَةٞ وَمَا هِيَ بِعَوۡرَةٍۖ إِن يُرِيدُونَ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا
33:13.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِذۡ قَالَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ يَٰأَهۡلَ يَثۡرِبَ لَا مَقَامَ لَكُمُۥ فَٱرۡجِعُواْۚ وَيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنُ فَرِيقٞ مِّنۡهُمُ ٱلنَّبِيَّ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ بِيُوتَنَا عَوۡرَةٞ وَمَا هِيَ بِعَوۡرَةٍۖ إِن يُرِيدُونَ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا

33:14.base_text: And had it been invaded from all its sides, then they were asked tribulation, they would have brought it and tarried not but a little.
33:14.bazzi_text: . . . they would have come to it . . .
33:14.qunbul_text: . . . they would have come to it . . .
33:14.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَوۡ دُخِلَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنۡ أَقۡطَارِهَا ثُمَّ سُئِلُواْ ٱلۡفِتۡنَةَ لَأَتَوۡهَا وَمَا تَلَبَّثُواْ بِهَا إِلَّا يَسِيرٗا
33:14.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَوۡ دُخِلَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنۡ أَقۡطَارِهَا ثُمَّ سُئِلُواْ ٱلۡفِتۡنَةَ لَأَتَوۡهَا وَمَا تَلَبَّثُواْ بِهَا إِلَّا يَسِيرٗا

33:30.base_text: O wives of the Prophet, if any one of you were ever to commit an evident obscenity, the punishment for her would be doubled twofold.
33:30.bazzi_text: . . . We would double the punishment for her twofold.
33:30.qunbul_text: . . . We would double the punishment for her twofold.
33:30.bazzi_ar_text: يَٰنِسَآءَ ٱلنَّبِيِّ مَن يَأۡتِ مِنكُنَّ بِفَٰحِشَةٖ مُّبَيَّنَةٖ نُّضَعِّفۡ لَهَا ٱلۡعَذَابَ ضِعۡفَيۡنِۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٗا
33:30.qunbul_ar_text: يَٰنِسَآءَ ٱلنَّبِيِّ مَن يَأۡتِ مِنكُنَّ بِفَٰحِشَةٖ مُّبَيَّنَةٖ نُّضَعِّفۡ لَهَا ٱلۡعَذَابَ ضِعۡفَيۡنِۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٗا

33:33.base_text: And settle in your houses and do not display yourselves as in the former days of pagan ignorance,
33:33.bazzi_text: And settle, revered, in your houses . . .
33:33.qunbul_text: And settle, revered, in your houses . . .
33:33.bazzi_ar_text: وَقِرۡنَ فِي بِيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَآ تَّبَرَّجۡنَ تَبَرُّجَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰۖ وَأَقِمۡنَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتِينَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِعۡنَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥۚ إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ لِيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُ ٱلرِّجۡسَ أَهۡلَ ٱلۡبَيۡتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمُۥ تَطۡهِيرٗا
33:33.qunbul_ar_text: وَقِرۡنَ فِي بِيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجۡنَ تَبَرُّجَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰۖ وَأَقِمۡنَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتِينَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِعۡنَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥۚ إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ لِيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُ ٱلرِّجۡسَ أَهۡلَ ٱلۡبَيۡتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمُۥ تَطۡهِيرٗا

33:68.base_text: Our Lord, give them double the punishment and curse them with a supreme curse.”
33:68.bazzi_ar_text: رَبَّنَا ءَاتِهِمُۥ ضِعۡفَيۡنِ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ وَٱلۡعَنۡهُمُۥ لَعۡنٗا كَثِيرٗا
33:68.qunbul_ar_text: رَبَّنَا ءَاتِهِمُۥ ضِعۡفَيۡنِ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ وَٱلۡعَنۡهُمُۥ لَعۡنٗا كَثِيرٗا

34:5.base_text: Those who strove against Our signs, attempting to challenge (God) — those ones, for them is a painful punishment of torment.
34:5.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُۥ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٞ
34:5.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُۥ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٞ

34:9.base_text: If We will, We can make the earth cave in beneath them, or let fall down on them pieces from the sky; indeed, in that is a sign for every penitent servant.
34:9.bazzi_ar_text: أَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمُۥ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِن نَّشَأۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ أَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآ۟ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ
34:9.qunbul_ar_text: أَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمُۥ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِن نَّشَأۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ أَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِۚ ا۪نَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ

34:15.base_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residence: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.bazzi_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residences: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.qunbul_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residences: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.bazzi_ar_text: لَقَدۡ كَانَ لِسَبَأَ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمُۥ ءَايَةٞۖ جَنَّتَانِ عَن يَمِينٖ وَشِمَالٖۖ كُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَٱشۡكُرُواْ لَهُۥۚ بَلۡدَةٞ طَيِّبَةٞ وَرَبٌّ غَفُورٞ
34:15.qunbul_ar_text: لَقَدۡ كَانَ لِسَبَأۡ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمُۥ ءَايَةٞۖ جَنَّتَانِ عَن يَمِينٖ وَشِمَالٖۖ كُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَٱشۡكُرُواْ لَهُۥۚ بَلۡدَةٞ طَيِّبَةٞ وَرَبٌّ غَفُورٞ

34:17.base_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and do We (thus) repay anyone except the staunch denier?
34:17.bazzi_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.qunbul_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.bazzi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيۡنَٰهُمُۥ بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلۡ يُجَٰزَيٰ إِلَّا ٱلۡكَفُورُ
34:17.qunbul_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيۡنَٰهُمُۥ بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلۡ يُجَٰزَيٰ إِلَّا ٱلۡكَفُورُ

34:20.base_text: And surely, Iblis confirmed his assumption about them. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.bazzi_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.qunbul_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ صَدَقَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ إِبۡلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَٱتَّبَعُوهُۥ إِلَّا فَرِيقٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
34:20.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ صَدَقَ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ إِبۡلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَٱتَّبَعُوهُۥ إِلَّا فَرِيقٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ

34:38.base_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to challenge (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.bazzi_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to thwart (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.qunbul_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to thwart (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُونَ
34:38.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُونَ

34:40.base_text: And on the day when He herds them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.bazzi_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.qunbul_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.bazzi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمُۥ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ نَقُولُ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰؤُلَآ۟ إِيَّاكُمُۥ كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
34:40.qunbul_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمُۥ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ نَقُولُ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰؤُلَآءِ ا۪يَّاكُمُۥ كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ

35:9.base_text: And Allah is the One Who sent the winds, stirring up clouds, then We drove them to a lifeless land whereby We revived the earth after it had died; likewise is Resurrection.
35:9.bazzi_text: And Allah is the One Who sent the wind, stirring up clouds, then We drove them to a lifeless land whereby We revived the earth after it had died; likewise is Resurrection.
35:9.qunbul_text: And Allah is the One Who sent the wind, stirring up clouds, then We drove them to a lifeless land whereby We revived the earth after it had died; likewise is Resurrection.
35:9.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي أَرۡسَلَ ٱلرِّيحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابٗا فَسُقۡنَٰهُۥ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٖ مَّيۡتٖ فَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلنُّشُورُ
35:9.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي أَرۡسَلَ ٱلرِّيحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابٗا فَسُقۡنَٰهُۥ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٖ مَّيۡتٖ فَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلنُّشُورُ

35:33.base_text: Gardens of Eden which they enter; they are adorned therein with gold bracelets and pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.bazzi_text: Gardens of Eden which they enter; they are adorned therein with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.qunbul_text: Gardens of Eden which they enter; they are adorned therein with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.bazzi_ar_text: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنٖ يَدۡخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمُۥ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ
35:33.qunbul_ar_text: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنٖ يَدۡخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمُۥ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ

36:5.base_text: (God bestowed it as) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.bazzi_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.qunbul_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

36:32.base_text: And none of them but will be arraigned before Us, all together.
36:32.bazzi_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.qunbul_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.bazzi_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
36:32.qunbul_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ

36:39.base_text: And We have determined the moon in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.bazzi_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.qunbul_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُۥ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
36:39.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُۥ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ

37:6.base_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lowest heaven with an adornment, the planets,
37:6.bazzi_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,
37:6.qunbul_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,
37:6.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةِ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
37:6.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةِ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ

37:8.base_text: They cannot eavesdrop on the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.bazzi_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.qunbul_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.bazzi_ar_text: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
37:8.qunbul_ar_text: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ

37:40.base_text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen servants.

37:74.base_text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen servants.

37:128.base_text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen servants.

37:160.base_text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen servants.

38:45.base_text: And recallsg Our servants Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight(s).
38:45.bazzi_text: And recallsg Our servant Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight(s).
38:45.qunbul_text: And recallsg Our servant Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight(s).
38:45.bazzi_ar_text: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
38:45.qunbul_ar_text: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ

38:84.base_text: except for your sincere chosen servants among them.”
38:84.bazzi_text: except for your sincere servants among them.”
38:84.qunbul_text: except for your sincere servants among them.”

38:85.base_text: He said, “So the truth is—and only the truth I say—
38:85.bazzi_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.qunbul_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.bazzi_ar_text: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
38:85.qunbul_ar_text: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ

39:8.base_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to make (people) stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.bazzi_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.qunbul_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
39:8.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ

39:9.base_text: Or what about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.bazzi_text: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.qunbul_text: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.bazzi_ar_text: أَمَنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدٗا وَقَآئِمٗا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
39:9.qunbul_ar_text: أَمَنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدٗا وَقَآئِمٗا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ

39:71.base_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.bazzi_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.qunbul_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.bazzi_ar_text: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمُۥ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمُۥ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمُۥ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمُۥ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
39:71.qunbul_ar_text: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمُۥ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمُۥ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمُۥ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمُۥ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ

39:73.base_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.bazzi_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.qunbul_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.bazzi_ar_text: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ طِبۡتُمُۥ فَٱدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
39:73.qunbul_ar_text: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ طِبۡتُمُۥ فَٱدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ

40:13.base_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and bestows—from on high—provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.bazzi_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and sends down provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.qunbul_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and sends down provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.bazzi_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ لَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقٗاۚ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا مَن يُنِيبُ
40:13.qunbul_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ لَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقٗاۚ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا مَن يُنِيبُ

40:37.base_text: the means of the heavens, so that I may view the God of Moses, though I surely think he is a liar.” And thus Pharaoh’s evil deeds were adorned for him and he was barred from the way, for Pharaoh’s plotting is in nothing but ruin.
40:37.bazzi_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.qunbul_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.bazzi_ar_text: أَسۡبَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِ مُوسَىٰ وَإِنِّي لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِبٗاۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِۚ وَمَا كَيۡدُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِلَّا فِي تَبَابٖ
40:37.qunbul_ar_text: أَسۡبَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِ مُوسَىٰ وَإِنِّي لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِبٗاۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِۚ وَمَا كَيۡدُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِلَّا فِي تَبَابٖ

40:40.base_text: Whoever has committed an evil deed will not be repaid except with its like, but whoever has acted righteously, whether male or female, while a believer—then those shall enter the Garden (of Paradise) where they shall be provided for without measure.
40:40.bazzi_text: . . . then those shall be entered into the Garden . . .
40:40.qunbul_text: . . . then those shall be entered into the Garden . . .
40:40.bazzi_ar_text: مَنۡ عَمِلَ سَيِّئَةٗ فَلَا يُجۡزَىٰ إِلَّا مِثۡلَهَاۖ وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوۡ أُنثَىٰ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يُدۡخَلُونَ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ يُرۡزَقُونَ فِيهَا بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ
40:40.qunbul_ar_text: مَنۡ عَمِلَ سَيِّئَةٗ فَلَا يُجۡزَىٰ إِلَّا مِثۡلَهَاۖ وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوۡ أُنثَىٰ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يُدۡخَلُونَ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ يُرۡزَقُونَ فِيهَا بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ

40:46.base_text: the Fire—they are exposed to it in the early morning and at nightfall, and on the day the Hour takes place (it is said): “Enter pl Pharaoh’s folk into the most intense punishment.”
40:46.bazzi_ar_text: ٱلنَّارُ يُعۡرَضُونَ عَلَيۡهَا غُدُوّٗا وَعَشِيّٗاۚ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ ٱدۡخُلُواْ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ أَشَدَّ ٱلۡعَذَابِ
40:46.qunbul_ar_text: ٱلنَّارُ يُعۡرَضُونَ عَلَيۡهَا غُدُوّٗا وَعَشِيّٗاۚ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ ٱدۡخُلُواْ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ أَشَدَّ ٱلۡعَذَابِ

40:58.base_text: And in no way are the blind and the seeing equal, nor are those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds (equal) to the evildoer. How little you remind yourselves!
40:58.bazzi_ar_text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡبَصِيرُ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا ٱلۡمُسِيٓءُۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
40:58.qunbul_ar_text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡبَصِيرُ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا ٱلۡمُسِيٓءُۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَ

40:60.base_text: Yet your Lord has said, “Call upon Me (and) I will respond to you. Indeed, those who are too arrogant to serve Me will enter Hell in humiliation.”
40:60.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ٱدۡعُونِيَ أَسۡتَجِبۡ لَكُمُۥۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ عَنۡ عِبَادَتِي سَيُدۡخَلُونَ جَهَنَّمَ دَاخِرِينَ
40:60.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ٱدۡعُونِيَ أَسۡتَجِبۡ لَكُمُۥۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ عَنۡ عِبَادَتِي سَيُدۡخَلُونَ جَهَنَّمَ دَاخِرِينَ

41:47.base_text: To Him is referred (all) knowledge of the Hour. And no products come out of their sheaths nor does any female carry or deliver but with His knowledge. And on the day when He calls out to them, “Where are My associates?” They said, “We declare to You, none of us is a witness.”
41:47.bazzi_text: And no product comes out of its sheaths nor does anyfemale conceive or deliver but with His knowledge.
41:47.qunbul_text: And no product comes out of its sheaths nor does anyfemale conceive or deliver but with His knowledge.
41:47.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُرَدُّ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِۚ وَمَا تَخۡرُجُ مِن ثَمَرَتٖ مِّنۡ أَكۡمَامِهَا وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثَىٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيهِمُۥ أَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيَ قَالُواْ ءَاذَنَّٰكَ مَا مِنَّا مِن شَهِيدٖ
41:47.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُرَدُّ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِۚ وَمَا تَخۡرُجُ مِن ثَمَرَتٖ مِّنۡ أَكۡمَامِهَا وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثَىٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيهِمُۥ أَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيَ قَالُواْ ءَاذَنَّٰكَ مَا مِنَّا مِن شَهِيدٖ

42:3.base_text: Thus reveals—to you and to those before you—Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise.
42:3.bazzi_text: Thus it is revealed to you and to those before you: Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise— 4 to Him belongs . . .
42:3.qunbul_text: Thus it is revealed to you and to those before you: Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise— 4 to Him belongs . . .
42:3.bazzi_ar_text: حمٓ عٓسٓقٓۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
42:3.qunbul_ar_text: حمٓۚ عٓسٓقٓۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ

42:25.base_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what youpl dob;
42:25.bazzi_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.qunbul_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.bazzi_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
42:25.qunbul_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ

42:27.base_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth. Rather, He bestowsa from on high in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.bazzi_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.qunbul_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
42:27.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ

42:28.base_text: And it is He who bestowsb rain from on high, after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.bazzi_text: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.qunbul_text: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.bazzi_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡوَلِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
42:28.qunbul_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡوَلِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ

43:10.base_text: He Who made the earth a cradlec for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.bazzi_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.qunbul_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.bazzi_ar_text: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَهۡتَدُونَ
43:10.qunbul_ar_text: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَهۡتَدُونَ

43:18.base_text: (thinking) “What! Someone brought up f amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.bazzi_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.qunbul_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.bazzi_ar_text: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ
43:18.qunbul_ar_text: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ

43:19.base_text: And they considered the angels, who are servantsh of the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witnessi their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.bazzi_text: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.qunbul_text: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.bazzi_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمُۥ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ إِنَٰثًاۚ أَشَهِدُواْ خَلۡقَهُمُۥۚ سَتُكۡتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمُۥ وَيُسۡـَٔلُونَ
43:19.qunbul_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمُۥ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ إِنَٰثًاۚ أَشَهِدُواْ خَلۡقَهُمُۥۚ سَتُكۡتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمُۥ وَيُسۡـَٔلُونَ

43:24.base_text: He would sayc, “Even if Id have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.bazzi_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.qunbul_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُمُۥ بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمُۥ عَلَيۡهِۦ ءَابَآءَكُمُۥۖ قَالُواْ إِنَّا بِمَا أُرۡسِلۡتُمُۥ بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
43:24.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُمُۥ بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمُۥ عَلَيۡهِۦ ءَابَآءَكُمُۥۖ قَالُواْ إِنَّا بِمَا أُرۡسِلۡتُمُۥ بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ

43:33.base_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with roofsg of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.bazzi_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.qunbul_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَوۡلَا أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبِيُوتِهِمُۥ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
43:33.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَوۡلَا أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبِيُوتِهِمُۥ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ

43:35.base_text: and (golden) decorations. Yet all that is nothingh but the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.bazzi_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.qunbul_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.bazzi_ar_text: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
43:35.qunbul_ar_text: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ

43:71.base_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever is desirede by the selves and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.bazzi_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.qunbul_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.bazzi_ar_text: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
43:71.qunbul_ar_text: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ

43:85.base_text: And supremely blessed be the One to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Who alone has knowledge of the Hour, and to Whom youpl are returnedc.
43:85.bazzi_text: And supremely blessed be the One to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Who alone has knowledge of the Hour, and to Whom they are returned.
43:85.qunbul_text: And supremely blessed be the One to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Who alone has knowledge of the Hour, and to Whom they are returned.
43:85.bazzi_ar_text: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يُرۡجَعُونَ
43:85.qunbul_ar_text: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يُرۡجَعُونَ

44:7.base_text: (from the) Lordg of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.bazzi_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.qunbul_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.bazzi_ar_text: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ إِن كُنتُمُۥ مُوقِنِينَ
44:7.qunbul_ar_text: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ إِن كُنتُمُۥ مُوقِنِينَ

45:21.base_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as equal to those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds, whether in their life or their death? Miserable is their judgment!
45:21.bazzi_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.qunbul_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.bazzi_ar_text: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمُۥ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمُۥ وَمَمَاتُهُمُۥۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
45:21.qunbul_ar_text: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمُۥ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمُۥ وَمَمَاتُهُمُۥۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ

45:24.base_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not remind yourselves?
45:24.bazzi_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.qunbul_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.bazzi_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمُۥ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
45:24.qunbul_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمُۥ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ

46:12.base_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that it may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.bazzi_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.qunbul_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that it may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.bazzi_ar_text: وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامٗا وَرَحۡمَةٗۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا لِّتُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
46:12.qunbul_ar_text: وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامٗا وَرَحۡمَةٗۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا لِّيُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ

46:15.base_text: And We have enjoined upon man excelling in showing kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.bazzi_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.qunbul_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.bazzi_ar_text: وَوَصَّيۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِۦ حُسۡنًاۖ حَمَلَتۡهُۥ أُمُّهُۥ كَرۡهٗا وَوَضَعَتۡهُۥ كَرۡهٗاۖ وَحَمۡلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهۡرًاۚ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرۡبَعِينَ سَنَةٗ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِيَ أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِي أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحٗا تَرۡضَىٰهُۥ وَأَصۡلِحۡ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِيۖ إِنِّي تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
46:15.qunbul_ar_text: وَوَصَّيۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِۦ حُسۡنًاۖ حَمَلَتۡهُۥ أُمُّهُۥ كَرۡهٗا وَوَضَعَتۡهُۥ كَرۡهٗاۖ وَحَمۡلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهۡرًاۚ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرۡبَعِينَ سَنَةٗ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِي أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِي أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحٗا تَرۡضَىٰهُۥ وَأَصۡلِحۡ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِيۖ إِنِّي تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ

46:16.base_text: Those are the ones from whom We accept the best of what they have done and whose misdeeds We overlook ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.bazzi_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.qunbul_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.bazzi_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمُۥ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمُۥ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
46:16.qunbul_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمُۥ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمُۥ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ

46:25.base_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, nothing could be seen except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.bazzi_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.qunbul_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.bazzi_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۭ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
46:25.qunbul_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۭ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ

47:4.base_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who were killed in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.
47:4.bazzi_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who combated in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.
47:4.qunbul_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who combated in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.

47:15.base_text: The likeness of the Garden (of Paradise) that the mindful (of God) have been promised: rivers of water, not staling; and rivers of milk whose taste has not changed; and rivers of wine, a delight for those who drink; and rivers of honey, clarified and pure. And they have therein of all products and forgiveness from their Lord. (How can this be) compared to the fate of those abiding in the Fire and were given, for drink, scalding water, so that it tore their bowels?
47:15.bazzi_text: The likeness of the Garden (of Paradise) that the mindful (of God) have been promised: rivers of water, never staling; and rivers of milk whose taste has not changed; and rivers of wine, a delight for those who drink; and rivers of honey, clarified and pure. And they have therein of all products and forgiveness from their Lord. (How can this be) compared to the fate of those abiding in the Fire and were given, for drink, scalding water, so that it tore their bowels?
47:15.qunbul_text: The likeness of the Garden (of Paradise) that the mindful (of God) have been promised: rivers of water, never staling; and rivers of milk whose taste has not changed; and rivers of wine, a delight for those who drink; and rivers of honey, clarified and pure. And they have therein of all products and forgiveness from their Lord. (How can this be) compared to the fate of those abiding in the Fire and were given, for drink, scalding water, so that it tore their bowels?
47:15.bazzi_ar_text: مَثَلُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلَّتِي وُعِدَ ٱلۡمُتَّقُونَۖ فِيهَا أَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّن مَّآءٍ غَيۡرِ أَسِنٖ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّن لَّبَنٖ لَّمۡ يَتَغَيَّرۡ طَعۡمُهُۥ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّنۡ خَمۡرٖ لَّذَّةٖ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّنۡ عَسَلٖ مُّصَفّٗىۖ وَلَهُمُۥ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ وَمَغۡفِرَةٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِمُۥۖ كَمَنۡ هُوَ خَٰلِدٞ فِي ٱلنَّارِ وَسُقُواْ مَآءً حَمِيمٗا فَقَطَّعَ أَمۡعَآءَهُمُۥ
47:15.qunbul_ar_text: مَثَلُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلَّتِي وُعِدَ ٱلۡمُتَّقُونَۖ فِيهَا أَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّن مَّآءٍ غَيۡرِ أَسِنٖ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّن لَّبَنٖ لَّمۡ يَتَغَيَّرۡ طَعۡمُهُۥ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّنۡ خَمۡرٖ لَّذَّةٖ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ وَأَنۡهَٰرٞ مِّنۡ عَسَلٖ مُّصَفّٗىۖ وَلَهُمُۥ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ وَمَغۡفِرَةٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِمُۥۖ كَمَنۡ هُوَ خَٰلِدٞ فِي ٱلنَّارِ وَسُقُواْ مَآءً حَمِيمٗا فَقَطَّعَ أَمۡعَآءَهُمُۥ

47:30.base_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secret exchanges.
47:30.bazzi_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.qunbul_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمُۥ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُمُۥ بِسِيمَٰهُمُۥۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمُۥ فِي لَحۡنِ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمُۥ
47:30.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمُۥ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُمُۥ بِسِيمَٰهُمُۥۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمُۥ فِي لَحۡنِ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمُۥ

48:9.base_text: that youpl may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.bazzi_text: that they may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.qunbul_text: that they may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.bazzi_ar_text: لِّيُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَيُعَزِّرُوهُۥ وَيُوَقِّرُوهُۥۚ وَيُسَبِّحُوهُۥ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلًا
48:9.qunbul_ar_text: لِّيُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَيُعَزِّرُوهُۥ وَيُوَقِّرُوهُۥۚ وَيُسَبِّحُوهُۥ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلًا

48:10.base_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then He will grant him a great reward.
48:10.bazzi_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then We will grant him a great reward.
48:10.qunbul_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then We will grant him a great reward.
48:10.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمُۥۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱللَّهَ فَسَنُؤۡتِيهِۦ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمٗا
48:10.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمُۥۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱللَّهَ فَسَنُؤۡتِيهِۦ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمٗا

49:18.base_text: Allah knows the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, for Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.
49:18.bazzi_text: Allah knows the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, for Allah is All-Seeing of what they do.
49:18.qunbul_text: Allah knows the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, for Allah is All-Seeing of what they do.
49:18.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ
49:18.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ

50:32.base_text: This is what youpl are promised—for every constant preserver who often turns to God,
50:32.bazzi_text: This is what they are promised—for every constant preserver who often turns to God,
50:32.qunbul_text: This is what they are promised—for every constant preserver who often turns to God,
50:32.bazzi_ar_text: هَٰذَا مَا يُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
50:32.qunbul_ar_text: هَٰذَا مَا يُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ

50:40.base_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and after prostrations.
50:40.bazzi_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.
50:40.qunbul_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.

50:44.base_text: The day the earth ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.bazzi_text: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.qunbul_text: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.bazzi_ar_text: يَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمُۥ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
50:44.qunbul_ar_text: يَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمُۥ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ

51:49.base_text: And We created all things in pairs, that you may remind yourselves.
51:49.bazzi_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.qunbul_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.bazzi_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
51:49.qunbul_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

55:35.base_text: Flares of fire, and brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
55:35.bazzi_text: Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
55:35.qunbul_text: Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.

56:19.base_text: causing them neither headache nor intoxication,
56:19.bazzi_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,
56:19.qunbul_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

56:62.base_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would remind yourselves!
56:62.bazzi_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.qunbul_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.bazzi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشَآءَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
56:62.qunbul_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشَآءَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

57:9.base_text: It is He who bestows upon His servant evident signs from on high to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.bazzi_text: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.qunbul_text: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.bazzi_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمُۥ لَرَءُوفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
57:9.qunbul_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمُۥ لَرَءُوفٞ رَّحِيمٞ

57:16.base_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which came down of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.bazzi_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.qunbul_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.bazzi_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمُۥ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمُۥۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ فَٰسِقُونَ
57:16.qunbul_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمُۥ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمُۥۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمُۥ فَٰسِقُونَ

57:18.base_text: Indeed, charitable men and charitable women who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.
57:18.bazzi_text: Indeed, men who believe and women who believe, who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.
57:18.qunbul_text: Indeed, men who believe and women who believe, who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.
57:18.bazzi_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَعَّفُ لَهُمُۥ وَلَهُمُۥ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
57:18.qunbul_ar_text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَعَّفُ لَهُمُۥ وَلَهُمُۥ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ

58:11.base_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in assemblies,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.bazzi_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.qunbul_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.bazzi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمُۥ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي ٱلۡمَجۡلِسِ فَٱفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُۥۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشِزُواْ فَٱنشِزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
58:11.qunbul_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمُۥ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي ٱلۡمَجۡلِسِ فَٱفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُۥۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشِزُواْ فَٱنشِزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ

59:14.base_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind walls. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.bazzi_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind a wall. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.qunbul_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind a wall. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.bazzi_ar_text: لَا يُقَٰتِلُونَكُمُۥ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِي قُرٗى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوۡ مِن وَرَآءِ جِدَٰرِۭۚ بَأۡسُهُمُۥ بَيۡنَهُمُۥ شَدِيدٞۚ تَحۡسِبُهُمُۥ جَمِيعٗا وَقُلُوبُهُمُۥ شَتَّىٰۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡقِلُونَ
59:14.qunbul_ar_text: لَا يُقَٰتِلُونَكُمُۥ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِي قُرٗى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوۡ مِن وَرَآءِ جِدَٰرِۭۚ بَأۡسُهُمُۥ بَيۡنَهُمُۥ شَدِيدٞۚ تَحۡسِبُهُمُۥ جَمِيعٗا وَقُلُوبُهُمُۥ شَتَّىٰۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمُۥ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡقِلُونَ

60:3.base_text: Day of Resurrection He will decide between you, for Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.
60:3.bazzi_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .
60:3.qunbul_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .

61:14.base_text: O you who have attained faith, be the supporters of Allah as Jesus, son of Mary, said to the disciples, “Who are my supporters towards Allah?” The disciples said, “We are the supporters of Allah.” Then a faction of the Children of Israel attained faith while another faction denied it, and We aided those who had attained faith against their enemy, so they came to prevail.
61:14.bazzi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُواْ أَنصَارٗا لِّلَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ لِلۡحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنۡ أَنصَارِي إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ قَالَ ٱلۡحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحۡنُ أَنصَارُ ٱللَّهِۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۢ بَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٞۖ فَأَيَّدۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمُۥ فَأَصۡبَحُواْ ظَٰهِرِينَ
