77:30.qunbul_text: Yet they cannot will, unless Allah wills.
77:30.bazzi_ar_text: ٱنطَلِقُواْ إِلَىٰ ظِلّٖ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبٖ
77:30.qunbul_ar_text: ٱنطَلِقُواْ إِلَىٰ ظِلّٖ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبٖ

78:19.base_text: and the sky was opened up and became gateways,
78:19.bazzi_text: and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
78:19.qunbul_text: and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,

78:33.base_text: as if they are yellow camels.
78:33.bazzi_text: as if they are herds of yellow camels.
78:33.qunbul_text: as if they are herds of yellow camels.

78:37.base_text: a measured gift, 37 (from) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, (from) the All-Merciful.
78:37.bazzi_text: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.
78:37.qunbul_text: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.
78:37.bazzi_ar_text: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُۥ خِطَابٗا
78:37.qunbul_ar_text: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُۥ خِطَابٗا

80:4.base_text: or to be reminded so that the reminder would benefit him?
80:4.bazzi_text: or to be reminded and the reminder would benefit him?
80:4.qunbul_text: or to be reminded and the reminder would benefit him?

80:25.base_text: that We poured down water in abundance,
80:25.bazzi_text: indeed, We poured down water in abundance,
80:25.qunbul_text: indeed, We poured down water in abundance,

81:10.base_text: and when the scrolls are made public,
81:10.bazzi_text: and when the scrolls are made entirely public,
81:10.qunbul_text: and when the scrolls are made entirely public,

81:12.base_text: and when purgatory is set fully ablaze,
81:12.bazzi_text: and when purgatory is set ablaze,
81:12.qunbul_text: and when purgatory is set ablaze,

81:24.base_text: and he does not stingily withhold (knowledge of) the hidden realm,
81:24.bazzi_text: and he is not accused of withholding (knowledge of) the hidden realm,
81:24.qunbul_text: and he is not accused of withholding (knowledge of) the hidden realm,

82:7.base_text: Who created you and formed you and proportioned you?
82:7.bazzi_text: Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
82:7.qunbul_text: Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?

82:19.base_text: (They will be recompensed on) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything
82:19.bazzi_text: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything
82:19.qunbul_text: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything
82:19.bazzi_ar_text: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
82:19.qunbul_ar_text: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ

84:12.base_text: and will roast at the Blaze.
84:12.bazzi_text: and will continuously roast at the Blaze.
84:12.qunbul_text: and will continuously roast at the Blaze.

84:19.base_text: youpl will surely mount stage by stage.
84:19.bazzi_text: you will surely mount stage by stage.
84:19.qunbul_text: you will surely mount stage by stage.

86:4.base_text: There is no self but has a preserver over it.
86:4.bazzi_text: Every self has a preserver over it.
86:4.qunbul_text: Every self has a preserver over it.
86:4.bazzi_ar_text: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
86:4.qunbul_ar_text: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ

88:11.base_text: in it you hear no nonsense;
88:11.bazzi_text: no nonsense is heard in it;
88:11.qunbul_text: no nonsense is heard in it;

89:18.base_text: and you do not urge one another to (serve) food to the destitute,
89:18.bazzi_text: and you do not urge (others) to (serve) food to the destitute,
89:18.qunbul_text: and you do not urge (others) to (serve) food to the destitute,

90:13-15.bazzi_text: (Nor) did he free a neck (from the yokes of slavery), 14 (nor) did he feed—on a day of starvation— 15 an orphaned relative
90:13-15.qunbul_text: (Nor) did he free a neck (from the yokes of slavery), 14 (nor) did he feed—on a day of starvation— 15 an orphaned relative

111:4.base_text: while his wife, that firewood carrier —
111:4.bazzi_text: while his wife, the firewood carrier—
111:4.qunbul_text: while his wife, the firewood carrier—
